“<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,user-scalable=no,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>NOT IN PARIS</title>
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#060606">
<link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icon-192.png">
<meta name="color-scheme" content="dark">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
@font-face{font-family:'CV';src:url('data:font/otf;base64,') format('opentype');font-weight:900;font-style:normal;font-display:block}

:root{
color-scheme:dark;
–black:#060606;–white:#F0EDE8;–grey:#111111;–mid:#1C1C1C;
–dim:#2A2A2A;–muted:#666;–green:#3D9B5A;–gold:#C9A84C;
–red:#C0392B;–blue:#2E6DA4;–bronze:#8B6914;–silver:#7A8FA6;
–goldtier:#C9A84C;–elite:#9B59B6;
–safe-bottom:env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px);
–nav-h:52px;
}

*{color-scheme:dark}
input,textarea,select{color-scheme:dark!important;background-color:#111111!important;color:#F0EDE8!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#F0EDE8!important;border-color:#2A2A2A!important;}
input::placeholder,textarea::placeholder{color:#2A2A2A!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#2A2A2A!important;}
input:-webkit-autofill,input:-webkit-autofill:hover,input:-webkit-autofill:focus,input:-webkit-autofill:active{-webkit-box-shadow:0 0 0 1000px #111111 inset!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:#F0EDE8!important;caret-color:#F0EDE8!important;}

*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#060606;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;color:#F0EDE8;-webkit-color-scheme:dark;color-scheme:dark}
#app{position:fixed;inset:0;overflow:hidden;background:var(–black)}
.screen{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(–black);overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;transform:translateX(110%);transition:transform .32s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);pointer-events:none;visibility:hidden}
.screen.active{transform:translateX(0)!important;pointer-events:auto;visibility:visible;z-index:5}
.t-brand{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:3px;line-height:1}
.t-mono{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace}
.t-label{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–muted)}

/* NAV */
.nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;background:rgba(6,6,6,.98);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(–mid);padding:10px 16px;padding-top:max(10px,env(safe-area-inset-top));display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-height:var(–nav-h);flex-shrink:0}
.nav-brand{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(–white)}
.nav-spacer{flex:1}
.nb{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);background:none;border:1px solid var(–dim);padding:6px 11px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.nb:hover,.nb:active{color:var(–white);border-color:var(–muted)}
.nb.gold{color:var(–gold);border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3)}

/* MEMBER BAR */
.member-bar{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border-bottom:1px solid var(–mid);padding:8px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.tier-badge{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px}
.tier-bronze{background:rgba(139,105,20,.12);color:var(–bronze);border:1px solid rgba(139,105,20,.3)}
.tier-silver{background:rgba(122,143,166,.12);color:var(–silver);border:1px solid rgba(122,143,166,.3)}
.tier-gold{background:rgba(201,168,76,.12);color:var(–goldtier);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.tier-elite{background:rgba(155,89,182,.12);color:var(–elite);border:1px solid rgba(155,89,182,.3)}
.trust-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex:1;min-width:120px;max-width:180px}
.trust-track{flex:1;height:2px;background:var(–dim);border-radius:1px;overflow:hidden}
.trust-fill{height:100%;background:var(–white);border-radius:1px;transition:width .6s ease}
.trust-fill.silver{background:var(–silver)}
.trust-fill.gold{background:var(–goldtier)}
.trust-fill.elite{background:var(–elite)}

/* FORMS */
.f{margin-bottom:16px}
.f label{display:block;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.fi{width:100%;background:#111;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:14px 15px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:16px;outline:none;color:var(–white);caret-color:var(–white);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–white);transition:border-color .2s;-webkit-appearance:none}
.fi:focus{border-color:var(–white)}
.fi::placeholder{color:var(–dim);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–dim)}
.fi:-webkit-autofill,.fi:-webkit-autofill:focus{-webkit-box-shadow:0 0 0 1000px #111 inset!important;-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–white)!important}

/* BUTTONS */
.btn{width:100%;background:var(–white);color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:2px;padding:12px 16px;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:15px;letter-spacing:2px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;white-space:nowrap}
.btn:active{transform:scale(.98);background:#d8d4ce}
.btn:disabled{background:var(–dim);color:var(–muted);cursor:not-allowed}
.btn-google{width:100%;background:#fff;color:#333;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:2px;padding:14px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:15px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;margin-top:10px}
.btn-google:active{background:#f5f5f5}
.btn-sm{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–muted);background:none;border:1px solid var(–dim);padding:10px 16px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s}
.btn-sm:hover{color:var(–white);border-color:var(–muted)}
.lnk{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–muted);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:3px;margin-top:12px;display:block}
.lnk:hover{color:var(–white)}
.err{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–red);letter-spacing:1px;text-align:center;min-height:20px;margin-bottom:10px}
.ok-msg{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–green);letter-spacing:1px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:10px}
.divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:16px 0}
.divider::before,.divider::after{content:’’;flex:1;height:1px;background:var(–dim)}
.divider span{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:2px}

/* BADGES */
.badge{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.badge.p{background:rgba(201,168,76,.1);color:var(–gold);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.badge.a{background:rgba(61,155,90,.1);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(61,155,90,.3)}
.badge.r{background:rgba(192,57,43,.1);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.3)}
.badge.u{background:rgba(100,100,100,.08);color:var(–muted);border:1px solid var(–dim)}
.badge.f{background:rgba(46,109,164,.1);color:var(–blue);border:1px solid rgba(46,109,164,.3)}

/* CARDS */
.card{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden}
.card-h{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px 14px;cursor:pointer;gap:8px;user-select:none}
.card-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1}
.card-meta{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.8}
.card-body{display:none;padding:0 14px 14px;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.card-body.open{display:flex}
.card-det{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);line-height:2;padding:8px 0;border-top:1px solid var(–mid)}

/* SPINNERS */
.spin-el{width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.15);border-top-color:#000;border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;flex-shrink:0}
.spin-el.light{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-top-color:var(–white)}
.page-spin{width:24px;height:24px;border:2px solid var(–mid);border-top-color:var(–white);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;margin:40px auto}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.2}}

/* SKELETON */
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:-200% 0}100%{background-position:200% 0}}
.skel{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#111 25%,#1a1a1a 50%,#111 75%);background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.4s infinite;border-radius:2px}
.skel-evt{height:110px;margin-bottom:2px;border-radius:0}

/* PHONE INPUT */
.phone-row{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:0}
.phone-cc{width:90px;flex-shrink:0;background:#111;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:14px 10px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:15px;color:var(–white);-webkit-appearance:none;outline:none;cursor:pointer}
.phone-cc:focus{border-color:var(–white)}
.phone-num{flex:1;background:#111;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:14px 15px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:16px;outline:none;color:var(–white);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–white);-webkit-appearance:none}
.phone-num:focus{border-color:var(–white)}
.phone-num::placeholder{color:var(–dim);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–dim)}

/* BOTTOM SHEET */

/* COUNT ROW */
.count-row{display:flex;align-items:center;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}
.cnt-btn{width:50px;height:50px;background:none;border:none;color:var(–white);font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .15s;line-height:1}
.cnt-btn:active{background:var(–mid)}
.cnt-val{flex:1;text-align:center;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–white)}

/* EVT SELECT */
.evt-sel{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:12px 15px;min-height:50px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
.rules-wrap{background:#060f14;border:1px solid #0d2035;border-left:3px solid var(–blue);border-radius:2px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:16px;display:none}
.rules-text{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:10px;color:#6899bb;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:12px;white-space:pre-line}
.rules-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #0d2035}
.rules-row input[type=checkbox]{width:18px!important;height:18px!important;accent-color:var(–blue);cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px}
.rules-label{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#6899bb;line-height:1.7}

/* TICKETS */
.t-card{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:12px;overflow:hidden}
.t-card-head{background:var(–white);color:var(–black);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.t-card-head *{color:var(–black)!important}
.t-card-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:2px}
.t-card-body{padding:12px 16px}
.t-card-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:7px}
.t-card-lbl{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:2px}
.t-card-val{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(–white);text-align:right}
.t-card-qr{background:#030303;padding:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.t-status-box{padding:14px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2;text-align:center;border-radius:2px}

/* PROFILE */
.rep-card{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:2px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
.rep-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
.rep-stat{background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:2px;padding:12px 8px;text-align:center}
.rep-num{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:32px;line-height:1;color:var(–white)}
.rep-num.g{color:var(–green)}.rep-num.gold{color:var(–goldtier)}.rep-num.elite{color:var(–elite)}
.rep-lbl{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:6px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:2px}
.ledger-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(–mid)}
.ledger-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.ledger-reason{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:.5px}
.ledger-delta{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;font-weight:700}
.ledger-delta.pos{color:var(–green)}.ledger-delta.neg{color:var(–red)}

/* ADMIN */
.a-tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(–mid);overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:40;background:#060606}
.a-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.a-tab{flex:1;min-width:52px;padding:11px 4px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5px;text-align:center;color:var(–muted);cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.a-tab.active{color:var(–white);border-bottom-color:var(–white)}
.a-panel{display:none;padding:16px}.a-panel.active{display:block}
.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px}
.stat{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:2px;padding:12px 4px;text-align:center}
.stat-n{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:34px;line-height:1;color:var(–white)}
.stat-n.r{color:var(–red)}.stat-n.g{color:var(–green)}.stat-n.gold{color:var(–goldtier)}.stat-n.b{color:var(–blue)}
.stat-l{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:6px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:2px}
.sec{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–muted);margin-bottom:8px}
.hr{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(–mid);margin:18px 0}
.ab{width:100%;background:var(–white);color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:2px;padding:12px;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:2px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;margin-bottom:8px}
.ab:disabled{background:var(–dim);color:var(–muted);cursor:not-allowed}
.ab.sec{background:none;color:var(–white);border:1px solid var(–dim);font-size:11px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;letter-spacing:1px}
.ab.danger{background:rgba(192,57,43,.12);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.3)}
.ai{width:100%;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:11px 13px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:14px;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(–white);-webkit-appearance:none}
.ai:focus{border-color:var(–muted)}
.at{width:100%;background:#070707;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:12px 14px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:13px;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;resize:none;line-height:1.6;color:var(–white)}
.at:focus{border-color:var(–muted)}
.add-wrap{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:2px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px}
.act-btn{padding:10px;border-radius:2px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;cursor:pointer;border:none;text-align:center;transition:all .2s;width:100%}
.act-btn.approve{background:rgba(61,155,90,.08);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(61,155,90,.2)}
.act-btn.reject{background:rgba(192,57,43,.07);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.15)}
.act-btn.freeze{background:rgba(46,109,164,.07);color:var(–blue);border:1px solid rgba(46,109,164,.2)}
.chips{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px}
.chip{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;padding:4px 9px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(–dim);color:var(–muted);background:none;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s}
.chip.active{color:var(–white);border-color:var(–muted);background:var(–mid)}
.ag{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.ag .ai{margin-bottom:0}
.ec{background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–mid);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:10px;overflow:hidden}
.ec-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start}
.ec-thumb{width:56px;height:56px;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;background:#0a0a0a;border-radius:2px;margin:10px 0 8px 10px;position:relative}
.ec-thumb img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.ec-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.ec-info{flex:1;padding:10px 10px 8px}
.ec-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:17px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1}
.ec-sub{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(–muted);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.8}
.cap-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:7px}
.cap-bg{flex:1;height:2px;background:var(–dim);border-radius:1px;overflow:hidden}
.cap-fill{height:100%;background:var(–white);border-radius:1px;transition:width .5s}
.cap-fill.warn{background:var(–goldtier)}.cap-fill.full{background:var(–red)}
.cap-txt{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(–muted);white-space:nowrap}
.ec-acts{display:flex;border-top:1px solid var(–mid)}
.ec-act{flex:1;padding:8px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(–muted);background:none;border:none;border-right:1px solid var(–mid);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.ec-act:last-child{border-right:none}
.ec-act:hover{color:var(–white);background:var(–mid)}
.ec-act.del:hover{color:var(–red)}
.qr-inp-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}
.qr-inp-row input{flex:1;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:12px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:13px;outline:none;color:var(–white);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:3px}
.qr-go{background:var(–white);color:var(–black);border:none;border-radius:2px;padding:12px 14px;font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:15px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
.qr-go:active{background:#d8d4ce}
.qr-res{display:none;border-radius:2px;padding:18px;margin-top:12px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2;text-align:center}
.qr-res.v{background:rgba(61,155,90,.06);color:var(–green);border:1px solid rgba(61,155,90,.2)}
.qr-res.i{background:rgba(192,57,43,.06);color:var(–red);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.15)}
.qr-res.u{background:rgba(100,100,100,.06);color:var(–muted);border:1px solid var(–dim)}
.qr-big{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:36px;letter-spacing:4px;display:block;margin-bottom:6px}
.checkin-card{padding:20px;text-align:center}
.checkin-tier{display:inline-block;margin-bottom:12px}
.checkin-streak{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(–gold);letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:6px}
.f-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}
.f-row select{flex:1;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:8px 11px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;outline:none;color:var(–white);-webkit-appearance:none}
.rep-adj-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 0;border-top:1px solid var(–mid)}
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(–white);color:var(–black);font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:2px;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.8)}
.toast.show{opacity:1}
#authModal{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center}
#authModal.show{display:flex}
.auth-sheet{background:var(–black);border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:14px 14px 0 0;width:100%;max-width:480px;padding:28px 24px;padding-bottom:max(40px,var(–safe-bottom));animation:slideUp .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
@keyframes slideUp{from{transform:translateY(100%)}to{transform:translateY(0)}}
.uz{border:2px dashed var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:#070707;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px}
.uz input{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;width:100%;height:100%}
.pp{display:none;margin-bottom:10px;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.pp img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.pp-rm{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);border:1px solid var(–dim);color:var(–white);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.empty{text-align:center;padding:36px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2.2}
.code-box{background:#070707;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);border-radius:2px;padding:9px 13px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(–gold);letter-spacing:4px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px}
.ref-ok{background:#060c08;border:1px solid rgba(61,155,90,.2);border-left:3px solid var(–green);border-radius:2px;padding:10px 14px;margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:12px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–green);display:none}
.ref-err{background:#0f0604;border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.2);border-left:3px solid var(–red);border-radius:2px;padding:10px 14px;margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:12px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–red);display:none}
#bootOverlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:999;background:#060606;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:opacity .5s ease}
#bootOverlay.fade{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
#bootOverlay.gone{display:none!important}
#bootOverlay .boot-brand{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:48px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:8px;animation:bootFade 1s ease forwards}
#bootOverlay .boot-sub{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:4px;animation:bootFade 1s .2s ease both}
@keyframes bootFade{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.pending-steps{padding:24px;max-width:280px;margin:0 auto}
.step-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
.step-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.step-dot.done{background:var(–green)}
.step-dot.wait{background:var(–gold);animation:pulse 1.8s infinite}
.step-dot.idle{background:var(–dim)}
.step-txt{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:.5px;line-height:1.6}
.step-txt.active{color:var(–white)}
.members-only-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:rgba(6,6,6,.9);border:1px solid var(–gold);padding:4px 10px;border-radius:2px;font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(–gold);letter-spacing:2px}

/* ─── EVENTS VIEW (LIST / CAL) ─── */
.events-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 18px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(–mid);flex-shrink:0}
.ev-title{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:34px;letter-spacing:2px;line-height:1;color:var(–white)}
.vt-wrap{display:flex;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;background:var(–grey)}
.vt-btn{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:9px 18px;background:none;border:none;color:var(–muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.vt-btn.active{background:var(–white);color:var(–black)}

/* ─── LIST VIEW CARDS ─── */
.evt-list-card{display:flex;align-items:stretch;border-bottom:1px solid #0f0f0f;background:#060606;cursor:pointer;transition:background .12s;min-height:100px}
.evt-list-card:active{background:#0d0d0d}
.elc-border{width:4px;flex-shrink:0;align-self:stretch}
.elc-thumb{width:62px;flex-shrink:0;background:#0a0a0a;align-self:center;margin:10px 0 10px 8px;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}
.elc-thumb img{width:100%;height:auto;display:block}
.elc-ph{width:62px;height:78px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;color:#1a1a1a}
.elc-body{flex:1;padding:14px 14px 14px 12px;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.elc-date{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:2.5px;color:#444;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px}
.elc-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:32px;letter-spacing:.5px;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;margin-bottom:4px}
.elc-genre{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:#444;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px}
.elc-quote{font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#2a2a2a;font-style:italic;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;margin-bottom:10px}
.elc-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:auto;gap:8px}
.elc-time{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#444;letter-spacing:.5px;flex-shrink:0}
.elc-reserve{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#000;border:none;border-radius:2px;padding:10px 20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .12s;flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap}
.elc-reserve:active{opacity:.85;transform:scale(.95)}
.res-inline{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .38s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);background:#070707;border-bottom:1px solid var(–dim)}
.res-inline.open{max-height:900px}
.ril-inner{padding:18px 16px 20px;border-left:3px solid var(–white)}
.ril-ph{display:flex;gap:6px}
.ril-cc{width:88px;flex-shrink:0;background:#111;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:13px 10px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:15px;color:var(–white);-webkit-appearance:none;outline:none}
.ril-cc:focus{border-color:var(–white)}
.ril-num{flex:1;background:#111;border:1px solid var(–dim);border-radius:2px;padding:13px 15px;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:16px;outline:none;color:var(–white);-webkit-appearance:none}
.ril-num:focus{border-color:var(–white)}
.ril-num::placeholder{color:var(–dim);-webkit-text-fill-color:var(–dim)}
.elc-time{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#444;letter-spacing:.5px;flex-shrink:0}
.elc-reserve{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#000;border:none;border-radius:2px;padding:10px 20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .12s;flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap}
.elc-reserve:active{opacity:.85;transform:scale(.95)}

/* ─── CALENDAR VIEW ─── */
.cal-wrap{padding:16px 18px 0}
.cal-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px}
.cal-nav{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:var(–grey);border:1px solid var(–dim);color:var(–white);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1;transition:background .15s}
.cal-nav:active{background:var(–mid)}
.cal-title{text-align:center}
.cal-month-txt{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:26px;letter-spacing:3px}
.cal-year-txt{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:3px;margin-top:2px}
.cal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:8px}
.cal-dh{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–dim);text-align:center;padding:6px 0;letter-spacing:1px}
.cal-cell{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-start;padding:3px 0;min-height:50px}
.cal-plain{width:32px;height:32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#2a2a2a}
.cal-ring{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;flex-shrink:0}
.cal-ring:active{transform:scale(.85)}
.cal-ring.cal-sel{color:#000!important;font-weight:900}
.cal-ring-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;margin-top:2px;opacity:.7}

/* ─── EVENT BALLOON ─── */
.cal-balloon{margin:0 0 14px;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;animation:bIn .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);border:1px solid var(–dim)}
@keyframes bIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10px) scale(.97)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}
.cal-b-bar{height:3px}
.cal-b-inner{padding:16px 16px 14px}
.cal-b-date{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:2.5px;color:var(–muted);margin-bottom:4px}
.cal-b-name{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:30px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:3px}
.cal-b-genre{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:5px}
.cal-b-quote{font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#444;margin-bottom:12px}
.cal-b-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.cal-b-time{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(–muted)}

/* ─── CAL INLINE FORM ─── */
.cal-form{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .38s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.cal-form.cal-form-open{max-height:900px}
/* ─── THIS MONTH SECTION ─── */
.ctm-wrap{padding:16px 18px 80px;border-top:1px solid var(–mid);margin-top:8px}
.ctm-lbl{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(–muted);letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:12px;text-transform:uppercase}
.ctm-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 0 10px 12px;border-left:2px solid;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .15s}
.ctm-item:active{opacity:.6}
.ctm-thumb{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;background:#0a0a0a;flex-shrink:0;position:relative}
.ctm-thumb img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.ctm-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.ctm-n{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.ctm-g{font-family:‘Space Mono’,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(–muted);margin-top:2px}
.ctm-d{font-family:‘CV’,sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:900;line-height:1;min-width:42px;text-align:right}

@media(min-width:768px){#app{max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;box-shadow:0 0 100px rgba(0,0,0,.95)};body{background:#020202}}
@media(min-width:1024px){#app{max-width:420px}}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<div id="bootOverlay">
  <div class="boot-brand" style="font-size:0"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NOT IN PARIS" style="height:48px;display:block;margin:0 auto"></div>
  <div class="boot-sub" id="bootSub">MEMBERS ONLY</div>
</div>

<div id="app">

<!-- LOGIN -->

<div class="screen" id="s-login" style="background:#060606;padding-top:env(safe-area-inset-top)">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:64px 24px 0">
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;text-align:center"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NOT IN PARIS" style="height:52px;display:block;margin:0 auto"></div>
    <div id="loginSlogan" class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:4px;margin-bottom:48px">MEMBERS ONLY</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:0 24px 60px">
    <div class="f"><label id="lbEmail">E-POSTA</label><input class="fi" type="email" id="loginEmail" placeholder="isim@ornek.com" autocomplete="email" inputmode="email" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')document.getElementById('loginPw').focus()"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbPw">ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="loginPw" placeholder="••••••••" autocomplete="current-password" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()"></div>
    <div class="err" id="loginErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="loginBtn" onclick="doLogin()"><span id="loginBtnTxt">GİRİŞ YAP</span></button>
    <div class="divider"><span>VEYA</span></div>
    <button class="btn-google" onclick="doGoogleLogin()">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18"><path fill="#4285F4" d="M16.51 8H8.98v3h4.3c-.18 1-.74 1.48-1.6 2.04v2.01h2.6a7.8 7.8 0 0 0 2.38-5.88c0-.57-.05-.66-.15-1.18z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M8.98 17c2.16 0 3.97-.72 5.3-1.94l-2.6-2.01c-.72.48-1.63.77-2.7.77-2.08 0-3.84-1.4-4.47-3.29H1.85v2.07A8 8 0 0 0 8.98 17z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M4.51 10.53A4.8 4.8 0 0 1 4.26 9c0-.53.09-1.04.25-1.53V5.4H1.85A8 8 0 0 0 .98 9c0 1.29.31 2.51.87 3.6l2.66-2.07z"/><path fill="#EA4335" d="M8.98 3.58c1.17 0 2.23.4 3.06 1.2l2.3-2.3A8 8 0 0 0 8.98 1 8 8 0 0 0 1.85 5.4L4.5 7.47c.63-1.89 2.4-3.29 4.48-3.29z"/></svg>
      Google ile Devam Et
    </button>
    <span class="lnk" id="loginApplyLink" onclick="G('s-register')" style="margin-top:18px">Hesabın yok mu? Başvur →</span>
    <span class="lnk" onclick="G('s-forgot')" style="margin-top:10px;color:var(--muted)">Şifremi unuttum</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FORGOT PASSWORD -->

<div class="screen" id="s-forgot">
  <div class="nav"><span class="nav-brand" style="font-size:14px">ŞİFRE SIFIRLAMA</span><div class="nav-spacer"></div><button class="nb" onclick="G('s-login')">← GERİ</button></div>
  <div style="padding:32px 24px">
    <p class="t-mono" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:24px">E-posta adresinizi girin. Şifre sıfırlama bağlantısı göndereceğiz.</p>
    <div class="f"><label>E-POSTA</label><input class="fi" type="email" id="forgotEmail" placeholder="isim@ornek.com" inputmode="email" autocomplete="email"></div>
    <div class="err" id="forgotErr"></div>
    <div class="ok-msg" id="forgotOk" style="display:none">Bağlantı gönderildi. E-postanı kontrol et.</div>
    <button class="btn" id="forgotBtn" onclick="doForgot()"><span id="forgotBtnTxt">GÖNDER</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NEW PASSWORD -->

<div class="screen" id="s-newpw">
  <div class="nav"><span class="nav-brand" style="font-size:14px">YENİ ŞİFRE</span></div>
  <div style="padding:32px 24px">
    <div class="f"><label>YENİ ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="newPwInput" placeholder="En az 8 karakter"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>ŞİFRE TEKRAR</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="newPwConfirm" placeholder="Aynı şifreyi tekrar gir" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doNewPassword()"></div>
    <div class="err" id="newPwErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="newPwBtn" onclick="doNewPassword()"><span id="newPwBtnTxt">ŞİFREYİ GÜNCELLE</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- REGISTER -->

<div class="screen" id="s-register">
  <div class="nav"><span class="nav-brand" id="regNavBrand" style="font-size:14px">BAŞVURU</span><div class="nav-spacer"></div><button class="nb" onclick="G('s-login')">← GERİ</button></div>
  <div style="padding:24px 24px 80px">
    <p class="t-mono" id="regSub" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:24px">Başvurunuz incelendikten sonra üyelik kodunuz iletilecek.</p>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbRef">REFERANS KODU <span style="color:var(--dim);font-size:7px">(OPSİYONEL)</span></label><input class="fi" type="text" id="refInput" placeholder="NIP-REF-XXXXXX" maxlength="14" oninput="this.value=this.value.toUpperCase();checkRef(this.value)"></div>
    <div class="ref-ok" id="refOk"></div>
    <div class="ref-err" id="refErr"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbName">İSİM SOYAD</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="regName" placeholder="Adınız ve soyadınız" autocomplete="name"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbRegEmail">E-POSTA</label><input class="fi" type="email" id="regEmail" placeholder="isim@ornek.com" autocomplete="email" inputmode="email"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbRegPw">ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="regPw" placeholder="En az 8 karakter" autocomplete="new-password"></div>
    <div class="f"><label id="lbPhone">TELEFON</label>
      <div class="phone-row">
        <select class="phone-cc" id="regPhoneCC"><option value="+90">🇹🇷 +90</option><option value="+7">🇷🇺 +7</option><option value="+1">🇺🇸 +1</option><option value="+44">🇬🇧 +44</option><option value="+49">🇩🇪 +49</option><option value="+33">🇫🇷 +33</option><option value="+39">🇮🇹 +39</option><option value="+34">🇪🇸 +34</option><option value="+31">🇳🇱 +31</option><option value="+41">🇨🇭 +41</option><option value="+43">🇦🇹 +43</option><option value="+48">🇵🇱 +48</option><option value="+380">🇺🇦 +380</option><option value="+30">🇬🇷 +30</option><option value="+40">🇷🇴 +40</option><option value="+46">🇸🇪 +46</option><option value="+47">🇳🇴 +47</option><option value="+45">🇩🇰 +45</option><option value="+972">🇮🇱 +972</option><option value="+971">🇦🇪 +971</option><option value="+98">🇮🇷 +98</option></select>
        <input class="phone-num fi" type="tel" id="regPhone" placeholder="5xxxxxxxxx" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="tel-national" maxlength="15">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="f"><label>INSTAGRAM</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="regInsta" placeholder="@kullaniciadi"></div>
    <div class="err" id="regErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="regBtn" onclick="doRegister()"><span id="regBtnTxt">BAŞVUR</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- COMPLETE PROFILE -->

<div class="screen" id="s-complete-profile">
  <div class="nav"><span class="nav-brand" style="font-size:14px">PROFİLİNİ TAMAMLA</span></div>
  <div style="padding:24px 24px 80px">
    <p class="t-mono" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:24px">Üyelik başvurunun tamamlanması için aşağıdaki bilgileri doldur.</p>
    <div class="f"><label>TELEFON</label>
      <div class="phone-row">
        <select class="phone-cc" id="cpPhoneCC"><option value="+90">🇹🇷 +90</option><option value="+7">🇷🇺 +7</option><option value="+1">🇺🇸 +1</option><option value="+44">🇬🇧 +44</option><option value="+49">🇩🇪 +49</option></select>
        <input class="phone-num fi" type="tel" id="cpPhone" placeholder="5xxxxxxxxx" inputmode="numeric" maxlength="15">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="f"><label>INSTAGRAM</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="cpInsta" placeholder="@kullaniciadi"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>REFERANS KODU <span style="color:var(--dim);font-size:7px">(OPSİYONEL)</span></label><input class="fi" type="text" id="cpRef" placeholder="NIP-REF-XXXXXX" maxlength="14" oninput="this.value=this.value.toUpperCase();checkRefCp(this.value)"></div>
    <div class="ref-ok" id="cpRefOk"></div>
    <div class="ref-err" id="cpRefErr"></div>
    <div class="err" id="cpErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="cpBtn" onclick="doCompleteProfile()"><span id="cpBtnTxt">BAŞVURUYU GÖNDER</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PENDING -->

<div class="screen" id="s-pending" style="padding-top:env(safe-area-inset-top)">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100%;padding:40px 24px;text-align:center">
    <div style="font-size:52px;margin-bottom:20px">⏳</div>
    <div id="pendingTitle" class="t-brand" style="font-size:36px;margin-bottom:12px">BAŞVURUNUZ ALINDI</div>
    <div id="pendingSub" class="t-mono" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:2.2;margin-bottom:40px;max-width:280px">Başvurunuz incelendikten sonra bilgilendirileceksiniz.</div>
    <div class="pending-steps">
      <div class="step-row"><div class="step-dot done"></div><div class="step-txt">Başvuru alındı ✓</div></div>
      <div class="step-row"><div class="step-dot wait"></div><div class="step-txt active">Admin incelemesi bekleniyor…</div></div>
      <div class="step-row"><div class="step-dot idle"></div><div class="step-txt">Üyelik kodu iletilecek</div></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-sm" onclick="doLogout()">← Çıkış Yap</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="screen active" id="s-customer" style="overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%">

  <div class="nav">
    <a onclick="G('s-customer')" style="cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NOT IN PARIS" style="height:22px;display:block"></a>

    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">

      <button id="flagEN" onclick="setLang('en')" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;opacity:.3;padding:2px;line-height:1">🇬🇧</button>
      <button id="flagRU" onclick="setLang('ru')" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;opacity:.3;padding:2px;line-height:1">🇷🇺</button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-left:8px">

  <div class="member-bar" id="memberBar" style="display:none">

    <span class="t-mono" id="mbName" style="font-size:10px;font-weight:500">—</span>
    <div class="trust-wrap">
      <div class="trust-track"><div class="trust-fill" id="trustFill" style="width:20%"></div></div>
      <span class="t-mono" id="trustVal" style="font-size:7px;color:var(--muted)">—</span>
    </div>
    <button class="nb" onclick="loadProfilePage()" style="font-size:11px;padding:4px 9px">👤</button>
    <span class="t-mono" id="refCopyBtn" onclick="copyRef()" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:2px;margin-left:auto">🔗 Referans</span>
  </div>

  <div id="announcementBar" style="display:none;background:rgba(201,168,76,.08);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);padding:8px 16px;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.7;text-align:center"></div>

  <!-- ── EVENTS MAIN ── -->

  <div id="eventsMain" style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;display:flex;flex-direction:column">

  <div class="nav"><span class="nav-brand" id="myTicketsTitle" style="font-size:14px">BİLETLERİM</span><div class="nav-spacer"></div><button class="nb" id="ticketsBackBtn" onclick="G('s-customer')">← GERİ</button></div>

</div>

  <div class="nav"><span class="nav-brand" style="font-size:14px">PROFİLİM</span><div class="nav-spacer"></div><button class="nb" onclick="G('s-customer')">← GERİ</button></div>

<!-- ADMIN LOGIN -->

<div class="screen" id="s-admin-login" style="padding-top:env(safe-area-inset-top)">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100%;padding:40px 28px">
    <div style="margin-bottom:6px;text-align:center"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NOT IN PARIS" style="height:44px;display:block;margin:0 auto 4px"></div>
    <div class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:40px">ADMİN PANELİ</div>
    <div style="width:100%;max-width:300px">
      <div class="f"><label>KULLANICI ADI</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="adminUser" autocomplete="off"></div>
      <div class="f"><label>ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="adminPw" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doAdminLogin()"></div>
      <div class="err" id="adminLoginErr"></div>
      <button class="btn" onclick="doAdminLogin()">GİRİŞ YAP</button>
      <span class="lnk" onclick="G('s-login')" style="margin-top:14px">← Geri</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN PANEL -->

<div class="screen" id="s-admin">
  <div class="nav">
    <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NIP" style="height:14px;display:block"><span class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:2px">ADMİN</span></span>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;margin-left:8px">
      <span style="width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);animation:pulse 2s infinite;display:inline-block"></span>
      <span class="t-mono" style="font-size:7px;color:var(--green)">CANLI</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-spacer"></div>
    <button class="nb" onclick="doAdminLogout()">ÇIKIŞ</button>
  </div>
  <div class="a-tabs">
    <button class="a-tab active" onclick="aTab('ov')">GENEL</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('mb')">ÜYELER</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('ev')">ETKİNLİK</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('rs')">REZ.</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('qr')">QR TARA</button>
    <button class="a-tab" onclick="aTab('st')">AYARLAR</button>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel active" id="ap-ov">
    <div class="stats-row" id="admStats"><div class="page-spin" style="margin:12px auto;grid-column:1/-1"></div></div>
    <div class="sec">SON BAŞVURULAR</div><div id="recM"></div>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">SON REZERVASYONLAR</div><div id="recR"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-mb">
    <div class="stats-row" id="mStats"></div>
    <div class="chips" id="mChips">
      <button class="chip active" onclick="setMC(this,'')">TÜMÜ</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setMC(this,'pending')">BEKLEYEN</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setMC(this,'approved')">ONAYLANDI</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setMC(this,'rejected')">REDDEDİLDİ</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setMC(this,'frozen')">DONDURULDU</button>
    </div>
    <div id="mList"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-ev">
    <div class="sec">YENİ ETKİNLİK EKLE</div>
    <div class="add-wrap">
      <div class="uz" id="uZone"><input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="onPoster(event)">
        <div style="font-size:28px;margin-bottom:4px">🖼️</div>
        <div class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted)">AFİŞ YÜKLE · 4:5 ORANI</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pp" id="pPrev"><img id="pPrevImg"><button class="pp-rm" onclick="rmP()">✕</button></div>
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neName" placeholder="Sanatçı adı">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neGenre" placeholder="Müzik türü (ör: Techno, House)">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="neSub" placeholder="Alt başlık / tagline">
      <div class="ag"><input type="date" class="ai" id="neDate"><input type="time" class="ai" id="neTime" value="22:00"></div>
      <div style="background:#080808;border:1px solid var(--dim);border-radius:2px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px">
        <div class="t-label" style="margin-bottom:8px">WARM-UP DJ (opsiyonel)</div>
        <input type="text" class="ai" id="neWarmupName" placeholder="Warm-up sanatçı adı" style="margin-bottom:6px">
        <div class="ag" style="margin-bottom:0"><input type="time" class="ai" id="neWarmupStart" value="22:00" style="margin-bottom:0"><input type="time" class="ai" id="neWarmupEnd" value="00:00" style="margin-bottom:0"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="t-label" style="margin-bottom:4px">MAIN DJ BİTİŞ SAATİ</div>
      <input type="time" class="ai" id="neTimeEnd" value="04:00">
      <input type="number" class="ai" id="neCap" placeholder="Kapasite" value="100">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid var(--dim);border-radius:2px;padding:11px 13px">
        <label class="t-label" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:1">KART RENGİ</label>
        <input type="color" id="neColor" value="#E0A030" style="width:44px;height:28px;border:none;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;background:none;padding:0">
        <span class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted)">genre auto</span>
        <button onclick="document.getElementById('neColor').value=''" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--dim);color:var(--muted);font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px">AUTO</button>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom:8px">
        <label class="t-label" style="display:block;margin-bottom:6px">ERİŞİM TÜRÜ</label>
        <div class="f-row" style="margin-bottom:0">
          <select class="ai" id="neAccess" style="margin-bottom:0" onchange="toggleMembersOnlyField()">
            <option value="open">Açık</option>
            <option value="members_only">Sadece Üyeler</option>
            <option value="tier_restricted">Seviye Kısıtlı</option>
            <option value="waitlist_only">Bekleme Listesi</option>
          </select>
          <select class="ai" id="neMinTier" style="margin-bottom:0;flex:0 0 100px">
            <option value="bronze">Bronz+</option>
            <option value="silver">Gümüş+</option>
            <option value="gold">Altın+</option>
            <option value="elite">Elit</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <input type="number" class="ai" id="neMinTrust" placeholder="Min. güven skoru" value="0">
      <div class="sec" style="font-size:11px;margin-top:6px;margin-bottom:4px">ETKİNLİK KURALLARI</div>
      <textarea class="at" id="neRules" placeholder="Her satır ayrı madde..." style="height:80px"></textarea>
      <button class="ab sec" onclick="loadLastRules()" style="margin-bottom:6px">↙ Son Kuralları Yükle</button>
      <button class="ab" id="addEvtBtn" onclick="addEvt()">ETKİNLİK OLUŞTUR</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sec">MEVCUT ETKİNLİKLER</div>
    <div id="evtList"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-rs">
    <div class="f-row" style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <select id="filterEvt" class="ai" onchange="renderRes()" style="margin:0"></select>
      <button class="ab sec" style="width:40px;padding:0;flex-shrink:0;font-size:16px;margin:0;height:40px" onclick="renderRes()">↻</button>
    </div>
    <div class="chips" id="rChips">
      <button class="chip active" onclick="setRC(this,'')">TÜMÜ</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setRC(this,'pending')">BEKLEYEN</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setRC(this,'approved')">ONAYLANDI</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setRC(this,'rejected')">REDDEDİLDİ</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setRC(this,'used')">KULLANILDI</button>
      <button class="chip" onclick="setRC(this,'no_show')">GELMEDİ</button>
    </div>
    <div id="rList"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-qr">
    <div style="background:#070707;border:1px solid var(--mid);border-radius:2px;padding:24px 16px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px">
      <video id="qrVideo" style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;object-fit:cover;display:none;background:#000;border-radius:2px"></video>
      <canvas id="qrCanvas" style="display:none"></canvas>
      <div id="camOff">
        <div style="font-size:44px;margin-bottom:12px">📷</div>
        <div class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:16px">KAMERA İLE OKUT VEYA KOD GİR</div>
        <button class="qr-go" style="width:100%;padding:14px" onclick="startCam()">KAMERAYI AÇ</button>
      </div>
      <div id="camOn" style="display:none;padding:8px 0">
        <div class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:10px">● TARANIYOR...</div>
        <button class="qr-go" style="background:var(--red);color:#fff;width:100%;padding:10px" onclick="stopCam()">✕ KAPAT</button>
      </div>
      <div class="qr-inp-row">
        <input type="text" id="qrInput" placeholder="NIP-XXXXXXXX" maxlength="12" oninput="this.value=this.value.toUpperCase()" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')scanQR()">
        <button class="qr-go" onclick="scanQR()">TARA</button>
      </div>
      <div class="qr-res" id="qrRes"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="a-panel" id="ap-st">
    <div class="sec">DUYURU</div>
    <textarea class="at" id="annTxt" style="height:80px" placeholder="Müşteri panelinde gösterilecek duyuru..."></textarea>
    <button class="ab" onclick="saveAnn()">DUYURUYU KAYDET</button>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">SLOGAN</div>
    <input type="text" class="ai" id="sloganTxt" placeholder="MEMBERS ONLY">
    <button class="ab" onclick="saveSlogan()">SLOGANI KAYDET</button>
    <div class="hr"></div>
    <div class="sec">ADMİN BİLGİLERİ</div>
    <div class="add-wrap">
      <input type="text" class="ai" id="newAdminUser" placeholder="Yeni kullanıcı adı">
      <input type="password" class="ai" id="newAdminPw" placeholder="Yeni şifre">
      <button class="ab sec" onclick="saveAdminCreds()">BİLGİLERİ GÜNCELLE</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- AUTH MODAL -->

<div id="authModal">
  <div class="auth-sheet">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:24px">
      <div style="margin-bottom:8px"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NOT IN PARIS" style="height:32px;display:block;margin:0 auto"></div>
      <div class="t-mono" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:2px">Rezervasyon için giriş yapın</div>
    </div>
    <div class="f"><label>E-POSTA</label><input class="fi" type="email" id="modalEmail" placeholder="isim@ornek.com" inputmode="email" autocomplete="email"></div>
    <div class="f"><label>ŞİFRE</label><input class="fi" type="password" id="modalPw" placeholder="Şifreniz" autocomplete="current-password" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doModalLogin()"></div>
    <div class="err" id="modalErr"></div>
    <button class="btn" id="modalLoginBtn" onclick="doModalLogin()" style="margin-bottom:10px"><span id="modalBtnTxt">GİRİŞ YAP</span></button>
    <div class="divider"><span>VEYA</span></div>
    <button class="btn-google" onclick="doGoogleLogin();closeAuthModal()">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18"><path fill="#4285F4" d="M16.51 8H8.98v3h4.3c-.18 1-.74 1.48-1.6 2.04v2.01h2.6a7.8 7.8 0 0 0 2.38-5.88c0-.57-.05-.66-.15-1.18z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M8.98 17c2.16 0 3.97-.72 5.3-1.94l-2.6-2.01c-.72.48-1.63.77-2.7.77-2.08 0-3.84-1.4-4.47-3.29H1.85v2.07A8 8 0 0 0 8.98 17z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M4.51 10.53A4.8 4.8 0 0 1 4.26 9c0-.53.09-1.04.25-1.53V5.4H1.85A8 8 0 0 0 .98 9c0 1.29.31 2.51.87 3.6l2.66-2.07z"/><path fill="#EA4335" d="M8.98 3.58c1.17 0 2.23.4 3.06 1.2l2.3-2.3A8 8 0 0 0 8.98 1 8 8 0 0 0 1.85 5.4L4.5 7.47c.63-1.89 2.4-3.29 4.48-3.29z"/></svg>
      Google ile Devam Et
    </button>
    <span class="lnk" onclick="closeAuthModal();G('s-register')">Hesabın yok mu? Başvur →</span>
    <span class="lnk" onclick="closeAuthModal()" style="margin-top:8px;color:var(--dim)">Vazgeç</span>
  </div>
</div>

  ru:{loginBtn:'ВОЙТИ',email:'ЭЛ. ПОЧТА',pw:'ПАРОЛЬ',noAccount:'Нет аккаунта? Подать заявку',nav:'ЗАЯВКА',sub:'Заявки рассматриваются вручную.',ref:'РЕФЕРАЛЬНЫЙ КОД',name:'ИМЯ И ФАМИЛИЯ',phone:'ТЕЛЕФОН',applyBtn:'ПОДАТЬ ЗАЯВКУ',pendingTitle:'ЗАЯВКА ПОЛУЧЕНА',pendingSub:'Вы получите уведомление после одобрения.',selAbove:'Выберите событие выше',selEvt:'ВЫБРАННОЕ СОБЫТИЕ',guests:'КОЛИЧЕСТВО ГОСТЕЙ',resBtn:'ЗАПРОСИТЬ БРОНИРОВАНИЕ',rules:'🔵 Я прочитал и согласен с правилами',tickets:'МОИ БИЛЕТЫ',back:'← НАЗАД',out:'ВЫХОД',membersOnly:'ТОЛЬКО ДЛЯ УЧАСТНИКОВ',membersOnlySub:'Для брони этого события нужно быть участником.',errInvalid:'Неверный email или пароль',errFields:'Заполните все поля',errPw:'Пароль должен содержать не менее 8 символов',nameLbl:'ИМЯ И ФАМИЛИЯ',phoneLbl:'ТЕЛЕФОН',sheetHintTxt:'↑ ФОРМА БРОНИРОВАНИЯ',guestsLbl:'КОЛИЧЕСТВО ГОСТЕЙ',selEvtLbl:'ВЫБРАННОЕ СОБЫТИЕ',selAboveTxt:'Выберите событие выше',guestNote:'Бронирование без членства. Баллы не начисляются.',rulesLbl:'🔵 Я прочитал и согласен с правилами'}
};
function t(k){return (LANG[State.lang]||LANG.tr)[k]||k;}

function setLang(l){
  State.lang=l;localStorage.setItem('nip_lang',l);
  ['TR','EN','RU'].forEach(function(f){var el=document.getElementById('flag'+f);if(el)el.style.opacity=l===f.toLowerCase()?'1':'0.3';});
  applyLangText();
  var ab=document.getElementById('announcementBar');
  if(ab&&ab.style.display!=='none'&&ab.dataset.original){
    if(l==='tr')ab.textContent=ab.dataset.original;
    else translateAnnouncement(ab.dataset.original,l);
  }
  // Re-render any open inline panels to update language
  document.querySelectorAll('.res-inline.open').forEach(function(panel){
    var eid=panel.dataset.eid;
    if(eid){var ev=State.events.find(function(x){return x.id===eid;});if(ev)openInlinePanel(eid,ev,genreColor(ev.genre,ev.color));}
  });
  // Re-render open cal forms
  document.querySelectorAll('.cal-form.cal-form-open').forEach(function(cf){
    var eid=cf.id.replace('cal-form-','');
    if(eid){var ev=State.events.find(function(x){return x.id===eid;});if(ev)openCalForm(eid);}
  });
  // Translate rules that are visible
  State.events.forEach(function(e){
    if(!e.rules)return;
    var riRules=document.getElementById('ri-rules-'+e.id);
    var cfRules=document.getElementById('cf-rules-'+e.id);
    if(riRules){if(l==='tr')riRules.textContent=e.rules;else translateRules(e.id,e.rules,l,riRules);}
    if(cfRules){if(l==='tr')cfRules.textContent=e.rules;else translateRules(e.id,e.rules,l,cfRules);}
  });
}

function applyLangText(){
  setTxt('loginBtnTxt',t('loginBtn'));setTxt('loginApplyLink',t('noAccount'));
  setTxt('regNavBrand',t('nav'));setTxt('regSub',t('sub'));
  setLbl('lbEmail',t('email'));setLbl('lbPw',t('pw'));
  setLbl('lbRef',t('ref'));setLbl('lbName',t('name'));
  setLbl('lbRegEmail',t('email'));setLbl('lbRegPw',t('pw'));setLbl('lbPhone',t('phone'));
  setTxt('regBtnTxt',t('applyBtn'));
  setTxt('pendingTitle',t('pendingTitle'));setTxt('pendingSub',t('pendingSub'));
  setTxt('evtSelNone',t('selAboveTxt'));
  setLbl('lbGuests',t('guestsLbl'));
  setTxt('rulesLabel',t('rulesLbl'));
  setTxt('outBtn',State.profile?t('out'):'GİRİŞ YAP');
  setTxt('myTicketsTitle',t('tickets'));setTxt('ticketsBackBtn',t('back'));
  setLbl('lbFName',t('nameLbl'));setLbl('lbFPhone',t('phoneLbl'));
  // Update all inline panel submit buttons and labels that are visible
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="ri-btntxt-"]').forEach(function(el){el.textContent=t('resBtn');});
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="cf-btntxt-"]').forEach(function(el){el.textContent=t('resBtn');});
}
function setTxt(id,v){var e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.textContent=v;}
function setLbl(id,v){var e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.textContent=v;}

// ═══ NAV ═══
function G(id){
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(function(s){s.classList.remove('active');});
  var el=document.getElementById(id);
  if(el){el.classList.add('active');setTimeout(function(){el.scrollTop=0;},50);}
}

// ═══ BOOT ═══
(async function boot(){
  try{
    applyLangText();
    if(location.pathname.includes('/admin')||location.hash==='#admin'){G('s-admin-login');hideBoot();return;}
    if(location.hash&&location.hash.includes('type=recovery')){G('s-newpw');hideBoot();return;}
    var [sessionRes]=await Promise.all([_SB.auth.getSession(),loadEvents()]);
    var session=sessionRes.data&&sessionRes.data.session;
    _SB.auth.onAuthStateChange(async function(event,newSession){
      State.session=newSession;
      if(event==='SIGNED_IN'&&newSession){
        await loadProfile();
        if(State.profile&&!State.profile.phone&&newSession.user.app_metadata&&newSession.user.app_metadata.provider==='google'){G('s-complete-profile');return;}
        afterProfileLoad();
      }
      if(event==='SIGNED_OUT'){State.profile=null;showGuestMode();}
      if(event==='PASSWORD_RECOVERY'){G('s-newpw');}
    });
    if(session){
      State.session=session;
      await loadProfile();
      if(!State.profile){await _SB.auth.signOut();showGuestMode();G('s-customer');hideBoot();return;}
      if(!State.profile.phone&&session.user.app_metadata&&session.user.app_metadata.provider==='google'){G('s-complete-profile');hideBoot();return;}
      afterProfileLoad();
    } else {
      showGuestMode();G('s-customer');
    }
    hideBoot();
    loadBranding();
  }catch(err){
    console.error('Boot error:',err);
    showGuestMode();G('s-customer');hideBoot();
  }
})();

function hideBoot(){
  var o=document.getElementById('bootOverlay');if(!o)return;
  o.classList.add('fade');setTimeout(function(){o.classList.add('gone');},550);
}

async function loadProfile(){
  if(!State.session)return null;
  var res=await _SB.from('profiles').select('id,name,display_name,email,phone,instagram,status,member_code,tier,trust_score,loyalty_score,reward_points,total_attended,total_no_show,total_reservations,attendance_streak,referral_code,referral_used,referral_limit').eq('id',State.session.user.id).single();
  if(res.error||!res.data)return null;
  State.profile=res.data;return res.data;
}

function afterProfileLoad(){
  var p=State.profile;
  if(!p){showGuestMode();G('s-customer');return;}
  if(p.status==='pending'){G('s-pending');return;}
  if(['rejected','frozen','banned'].includes(p.status)){doLogout();return;}
  showMemberMode(p);G('s-customer');
}

function showGuestMode(){
  var mb=document.getElementById('memberBar');if(mb)mb.style.display='none';
  var ob=document.getElementById('outBtn');if(ob){ob.textContent='GİRİŞ YAP';ob.onclick=showAuthModal;}
}

function showMemberMode(p){
  var mb=document.getElementById('memberBar');if(mb)mb.style.display='flex';
  var ob=document.getElementById('outBtn');if(ob){ob.textContent=t('out');ob.onclick=doLogout;}
  renderMemberBar(p);
  var fn=document.getElementById('fName');if(fn)fn.value=p.name||'';
  var fp=document.getElementById('fPhone');if(fp)fp.value=p.phone||'';
}

function renderMemberBar(p){
  var tb=document.getElementById('tierBadge');
  if(tb){var tl=(TIER_LABELS[State.lang]||TIER_LABELS.tr)[p.tier]||p.tier.toUpperCase();tb.textContent=tl;tb.className='tier-badge '+(TIER_COLORS[p.tier]||'tier-bronze');}
  setTxt('mbName',p.display_name||p.name);
  var pct=Math.min(100,Math.round((p.trust_score/500)*100));
  var fill=document.getElementById('trustFill');
  if(fill){fill.style.width=pct+'%';fill.className='trust-fill '+p.tier;}
  setTxt('trustVal',p.trust_score+'/500');
}

async function loadBranding(){
  try{
    var res=await _SB.from('settings').select('key,value').in('key',['announcement','slogan']);
    if(!res.data)return;
    res.data.forEach(function(row){
      if(row.key==='slogan'){var sl=document.getElementById('loginSlogan');if(sl)sl.textContent=row.value;var bs=document.getElementById('bootSub');if(bs)bs.textContent=row.value;var slt=document.getElementById('sloganTxt');if(slt)slt.value=row.value;}
      if(row.key==='announcement'&&row.value&&row.value.trim()){var ab=document.getElementById('announcementBar');if(ab){ab.style.display='block';ab.textContent=row.value;ab.dataset.original=row.value;}if(State.lang!=='tr'){translateAnnouncement(row.value,State.lang);}var at=document.getElementById('annTxt');if(at)at.value=row.value;}
    });
  }catch(e){}
}

async function translateAnnouncement(text,lang){
  try{
    var pair={en:'tr|en',ru:'tr|ru'}[lang]||'tr|en';
    var url='https://api.mymemory.translated.net/get?q='+encodeURIComponent(text)+'&langpair='+pair;
    var r=await fetch(url);var d=await r.json();
    if(d.responseData&&d.responseData.translatedText){var ab=document.getElementById('announcementBar');if(ab)ab.textContent=d.responseData.translatedText;}
  }catch(e){}
}

// ═══ AUTH ═══
async function doLogin(){
  var email=val('loginEmail').toLowerCase().trim(),pw=val('loginPw');
  setErr('loginErr','');
  if(!email||!pw){setErr('loginErr',t('errFields'));return;}
  setLoading('loginBtn','loginBtnTxt',t('loginBtn'),true);
  var res=await _SB.auth.signInWithPassword({email,password:pw});
  setLoading('loginBtn','loginBtnTxt',t('loginBtn'),false);
  if(res.error){setErr('loginErr',t('errInvalid'));return;}
  State.session=res.data.session;await loadProfile();afterProfileLoad();
}

async function doGoogleLogin(){
  var {error}=await _SB.auth.signInWithOAuth({provider:'google',options:{redirectTo:'https://reservation.notinparis.me'}});
  if(error)toast('Google girişi başarısız: '+error.message);
}

async function doLogout(){
  if(State.ticketSub){_SB.removeChannel(State.ticketSub);State.ticketSub=null;}
  await _SB.auth.signOut();
  State.profile=null;State.session=null;State.selectedEventId=null;State.guestCount=1;
  var en2=document.getElementById('evtSelNone');if(en2)en2.style.display='';
  var ed=document.getElementById('evtSelDot');if(ed)ed.style.display='none';
  var et=document.getElementById('evtSelTxt');if(et)et.style.display='none';
  resetSheet();showGuestMode();G('s-login');
}

async function doForgot(){
  var email=val('forgotEmail').toLowerCase().trim();
  setErr('forgotErr','');var ok=document.getElementById('forgotOk');if(ok)ok.style.display='none';
  if(!email){setErr('forgotErr',t('errFields'));return;}
  setLoading('forgotBtn','forgotBtnTxt','GÖNDER',true);
  var res=await _SB.auth.resetPasswordForEmail(email,{redirectTo:location.href.split('?')[0]+'#recovery'});
  setLoading('forgotBtn','forgotBtnTxt','GÖNDER',false);
  if(res.error){setErr('forgotErr',res.error.message);return;}
  if(ok)ok.style.display='block';
}

async function doNewPassword(){
  var pw=val('newPwInput'),pw2=val('newPwConfirm');
  setErr('newPwErr','');
  if(!pw||!pw2){setErr('newPwErr',t('errFields'));return;}
  if(pw.length<8){setErr('newPwErr',t('errPw'));return;}
  if(pw!==pw2){setErr('newPwErr','Şifreler eşleşmiyor');return;}
  setLoading('newPwBtn','newPwBtnTxt','ŞİFREYİ GÜNCELLE',true);
  var res=await _SB.auth.updateUser({password:pw});
  setLoading('newPwBtn','newPwBtnTxt','ŞİFREYİ GÜNCELLE',false);
  if(res.error){setErr('newPwErr',res.error.message);return;}
  toast('Şifreniz güncellendi ✓');G('s-login');
}

// ═══ REGISTER ═══
var _refTimer=null,_refProfile=null,_cpRefProfile=null;

function checkRef(v){
  clearTimeout(_refTimer);
  var ok=document.getElementById('refOk'),er=document.getElementById('refErr');
  if(ok)ok.style.display='none';if(er)er.style.display='none';_refProfile=null;
  if(!v||v.length<10)return;
  _refTimer=setTimeout(async function(){
    var res=await _SB.from('profiles').select('id,name,referral_used,referral_limit').eq('referral_code',v).eq('status','approved').single();
    if(res.data){var used=res.data.referral_used||0,lim=res.data.referral_limit||3;if(used>=lim){if(er){er.textContent='Bu referans kodunun hakkı dolmuş';er.style.display='block';}_refProfile=null;}else{_refProfile=res.data;if(ok){ok.textContent='✓ Referans: '+res.data.name+' ('+(lim-used)+' hak kaldı)';ok.style.display='block';}}}else{if(er){er.textContent='Geçersiz referans kodu';er.style.display='block';}}
  },400);
}

function checkRefCp(v){
  clearTimeout(_refTimer);
  var ok=document.getElementById('cpRefOk'),er=document.getElementById('cpRefErr');
  if(ok)ok.style.display='none';if(er)er.style.display='none';_cpRefProfile=null;
  if(!v||v.length<10)return;
  _refTimer=setTimeout(async function(){
    var res=await _SB.from('profiles').select('id,name,referral_used,referral_limit').eq('referral_code',v).eq('status','approved').single();
    if(res.data){var used=res.data.referral_used||0,lim=res.data.referral_limit||3;if(used>=lim){if(er){er.textContent='Bu referans kodunun hakkı dolmuş';er.style.display='block';}_cpRefProfile=null;}else{_cpRefProfile=res.data;if(ok){ok.textContent='✓ '+res.data.name;ok.style.display='block';}}}
  },400);
}

async function doRegister(){
  var name=val('regName').trim(),email=val('regEmail').toLowerCase().trim(),pw=val('regPw'),insta=val('regInsta').trim();
  var phoneCC=val('regPhoneCC')||'+90',phoneNum=val('regPhone').trim(),phone=phoneNum?(phoneCC+phoneNum):'';
  var refCode=val('refInput').toUpperCase().trim();
  setErr('regErr','');
  if(!name||!email||!pw||!phone){setErr('regErr',t('errFields'));return;}
  if(pw.length<8){setErr('regErr',t('errPw'));return;}
  if(refCode&&!_refProfile){setErr('regErr','Geçersiz referans kodu');return;}
  setLoading('regBtn','regBtnTxt',t('applyBtn'),true);
  var res=await _SB.auth.signUp({email,password:pw,options:{data:{name,phone,instagram:insta||null,referral_code:refCode||null}}});
  setLoading('regBtn','regBtnTxt',t('applyBtn'),false);
  if(res.error){if(res.error.message.includes('already registered')||res.error.message.includes('User already')){setErr('regErr','Bu e-posta zaten kayıtlı');}else{setErr('regErr',res.error.message);}return;}
  if(res.data.session){State.session=res.data.session;await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,1000);});await loadProfile();afterProfileLoad();}else{G('s-pending');}
}

async function doCompleteProfile(){
  var cpCC=val('cpPhoneCC')||'+90',cpNum=val('cpPhone').trim(),phone=cpNum?(cpCC+cpNum):'',insta=val('cpInsta').trim(),refCode=val('cpRef').toUpperCase().trim();
  setErr('cpErr','');
  if(!phone){setErr('cpErr','Telefon numarası zorunludur');return;}
  setLoading('cpBtn','cpBtnTxt','BAŞVURUYU GÖNDER',true);
  var upd={phone,instagram:insta||null,status:'pending'};
  if(refCode&&_cpRefProfile){upd.status='approved';upd.member_code='NIP-MBR-'+randomHex(6).toUpperCase();upd.ref_by=_cpRefProfile.name;upd.referred_by=_cpRefProfile.id;await _SB.from('profiles').update({referral_used:(_cpRefProfile.referral_used||0)+1}).eq('id',_cpRefProfile.id);}
  var res=await _SB.from('profiles').update(upd).eq('id',State.session.user.id);
  setLoading('cpBtn','cpBtnTxt','BAŞVURUYU GÖNDER',false);
  if(res.error){setErr('cpErr',res.error.message);return;}
  await loadProfile();afterProfileLoad();
}

// ═══ GENRE COLOR ═══
function genreColor(genre,customColor){
  if(customColor&&customColor.trim()&&customColor!=='#000000')return customColor.trim();
  if(!genre)return '#888888';
  var g=genre.toLowerCase();
  if(g.includes('techno')||g.includes('industrial'))return '#E8302F';
  if(g.includes('deep house')||g.includes('minimal'))return '#4A7FE0';
  if(g.includes('acid')||g.includes('ebm'))return '#9B59B6';
  if(g.includes('ambient')||g.includes('electronica'))return '#00C9A7';
  if(g.includes('dnb')||g.includes('drum'))return '#E06030';
  if(g.includes('disco')||g.includes('funk'))return '#E030A0';
  if(g.includes('house'))return '#E0A030';
  if(g.includes('trance'))return '#00AAFF';
  return '#888888';
}

// ═══ DATE FORMAT ═══
function formatEventDate(s){
  if(!s)return '';
  try{
    var d=new Date(s+'T12:00:00');
    var days=['SUN','MON','TUE','WED','THU','FRI','SAT'];
    var months=['JANUARY','FEBRUARY','MARCH','APRIL','MAY','JUNE','JULY','AUGUST','SEPTEMBER','OCTOBER','NOVEMBER','DECEMBER'];
    return days[d.getDay()]+' '+d.getDate()+' '+months[d.getMonth()];
  }catch(e){return s;}
}

// ═══ EVENTS LOADING ═══
async function loadEvents(){
  var today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  // Try with color column first; fall back without it if column doesn't exist yet
  var res=await _SB.from('events').select('id,name,genre,subtitle,date,time,poster_thumb,poster_blur,capacity,approved_count,access_type,min_tier,min_trust,rules,note,status').eq('status','active').gte('date',today).order('date',{ascending:true});
  if(res.error&&((res.error.message||'').includes('color')||(res.error.message||'').includes('warmup')||(res.error.message||'').includes('time_end')||(res.error.message||'').includes('column'))){
    res=await _SB.from('events').select('id,name,genre,subtitle,date,time,time_end,warmup_name,warmup_start,warmup_end,poster_thumb,poster_blur,capacity,approved_count,access_type,min_tier,min_trust,rules,note,status,color').eq('status','active').gte('date',today).order('date',{ascending:true});
  }
  State.events=res.data||[];
  renderEvents();
}

function renderEvents(){
  // On first cal render, jump to first month that has events if current month is empty
  if(State.view==='cal'&&!State._calInitialized){
    State._calInitialized=true;
    var now=new Date();
    var curY=now.getFullYear(),curM=now.getMonth();
    var hasThisMonth=State.events.some(function(e){
      if(!e.date)return false;
      var d=new Date(e.date+'T12:00:00');
      return d.getFullYear()===curY&&d.getMonth()===curM;
    });
    if(!hasThisMonth&&State.events.length){
      var first=State.events[0];
      var fd=new Date(first.date+'T12:00:00');
      State.calYear=fd.getFullYear();
      State.calMonth=fd.getMonth();
    }
  }
  if(State.view==='list')renderListView();
  else renderCal();
}

// ═══ VIEW TOGGLE ═══
function setView(v){
  State.view=v;
  if(v==='cal')State._calInitialized=false;
  var lv=document.getElementById('listView'),cv=document.getElementById('calView');
  var bl=document.getElementById('btnList'),bc=document.getElementById('btnCal');
  if(lv)lv.style.display=v==='list'?'block':'none';
  if(cv)cv.style.display=v==='cal'?'block':'none';
  if(bl)bl.classList.toggle('active',v==='list');
  if(bc)bc.classList.toggle('active',v==='cal');
  renderEvents();
}

// ═══ LIST VIEW ═══
function renderListView(){
  var el=document.getElementById('listView');if(!el)return;
  if(!State.events.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty" style="padding-bottom:100px">Yaklaşan etkinlik yok.</div>';return;}
  el.innerHTML='';
  State.events.forEach(function(e){
    var color=genreColor(e.genre,e.color);
    var membersOnly=isMembersOnly(e)&&!userIsMember();var isMO=isMembersOnly(e);
    // Card
    var card=document.createElement('div');card.className='evt-list-card';card.dataset.eid=e.id;
    var border=document.createElement('div');border.className='elc-border';border.style.background=color;
    var thumb=document.createElement('div');thumb.className='elc-thumb';
    if(e.poster_thumb){var img=document.createElement('img');img.src=e.poster_thumb;img.loading='lazy';thumb.appendChild(img);}
    else{var ph=document.createElement('div');ph.className='elc-ph';ph.textContent='🎵';thumb.appendChild(ph);}
    var body=document.createElement('div');body.className='elc-body';
    var dEl=document.createElement('div');dEl.className='elc-date';dEl.textContent=formatEventDate(e.date);
    var nEl=document.createElement('div');nEl.className='elc-name';nEl.textContent=e.name;
    var gEl=document.createElement('div');gEl.className='elc-genre';gEl.textContent=e.genre||'';
    body.appendChild(dEl);body.appendChild(nEl);body.appendChild(gEl);
    if(e.subtitle){var qEl=document.createElement('div');qEl.className='elc-quote';qEl.textContent='"'+e.subtitle+'"';body.appendChild(qEl);}
    var foot=document.createElement('div');foot.className='elc-footer';
    var timeStr=(e.time||'')+(e.time_end?' — '+e.time_end:'');var timeEl=document.createElement('span');timeEl.className='elc-time';timeEl.textContent=timeStr;
    var resBtn=document.createElement('button');resBtn.className='elc-reserve';
    if(membersOnly){
      resBtn.textContent='YALNIZCA ÜYELER';
      resBtn.style.cssText='background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#444;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:10px 12px;cursor:default;font-family:Space Mono,monospace';
      resBtn.title='Bu etkinlik sadece üyelere açıktır';
    } else {
      resBtn.textContent='RESERVE';
      resBtn.style.background=color;
      (function(eid,col){resBtn.onclick=function(ev){ev.stopPropagation();selEvt(eid,col);};})(e.id,color);
    }
    if(isMembersOnly(e)){
      var moTag=document.createElement('span');
      moTag.style.cssText='font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:1px;color:'+color+';background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);border:1px solid '+color+'33;border-radius:2px;padding:2px 7px;display:inline-block;margin-bottom:4px';
      moTag.textContent='ÜYELERE ÖZEL';
      body.insertBefore(moTag, body.firstChild);
    }
    foot.appendChild(timeEl);foot.appendChild(resBtn);body.appendChild(foot);
    card.appendChild(border);card.appendChild(thumb);card.appendChild(body);
    (function(eid,col){card.addEventListener('click',function(){selEvt(eid,col);});})(e.id,color);
    el.appendChild(card);
    // Inline panel — appended right after each card
    var panel=document.createElement('div');panel.className='res-inline';panel.id='ri-'+e.id;panel.dataset.eid=e.id;
    el.appendChild(panel);
  });
}

// ═══ CALENDAR VIEW ═══
var CAL_MONTH_NAMES=['JANUARY','FEBRUARY','MARCH','APRIL','MAY','JUNE','JULY','AUGUST','SEPTEMBER','OCTOBER','NOVEMBER','DECEMBER'];

function renderCal(){
  var el=document.getElementById('calView');if(!el)return;
  var year=State.calYear,month=State.calMonth;
  // Build event date map
  var evtMap={};
  State.events.forEach(function(e){if(e.date)evtMap[e.date]=e;});
  // Calendar grid
  var firstDay=(new Date(year,month,1).getDay()+6)%7; // Mon=0
  var daysInMonth=new Date(year,month+1,0).getDate();
  var today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

  var html='<div class="cal-wrap">';
  html+='<div class="cal-header"><button class="cal-nav" onclick="prevMonth()">‹</button><div class="cal-title"><div class="cal-month-txt">'+CAL_MONTH_NAMES[month]+'</div><div class="cal-year-txt">'+year+'</div></div><button class="cal-nav" onclick="nextMonth()">›</button></div>';
  html+='<div class="cal-grid">';
  ['M','T','W','T','F','S','S'].forEach(function(d){html+='<div class="cal-dh">'+d+'</div>';});
  for(var i=0;i<firstDay;i++)html+='<div class="cal-cell"></div>';
  for(var d2=1;d2<=daysInMonth;d2++){
    var ds=year+'-'+String(month+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d2).padStart(2,'0');
    var evt=evtMap[ds];
    if(evt){
      var c=genreColor(evt.genre,evt.color);
      var isSel=State.calSelected===ds;
      var glow=isSel?'box-shadow:0 0 12px 2px '+c+',0 0 24px 4px '+c+'44':'box-shadow:0 0 6px 1px '+c+'66';html+='<div class="cal-cell"><div class="cal-ring'+(isSel?' cal-sel':'')+'" style="border-color:'+c+';color:'+(isSel?'#000':c)+';background:'+(isSel?c:'transparent')+';'+glow+'" onclick="calTap(\''+ds+'\')">'+d2+'</div><div class="cal-ring-dot" style="background:'+c+';box-shadow:0 0 4px '+c+'"></div></div>';
    } else {
      html+='<div class="cal-cell"><div class="cal-plain'+(ds===today?' cal-today':'')+'">'+d2+'</div></div>';
    }
  }
  html+='</div>';// /cal-grid
  // Balloon
  if(State.calSelected&&evtMap[State.calSelected]){
    var se=evtMap[State.calSelected];var sc=genreColor(se.genre);
    var mo2=isMembersOnly(se)&&!userIsMember();
    var moCalBtn=isMembersOnly(se)&&!userIsMember();
    var calBtnStyle='background:'+sc+';padding:8px 20px;font-size:11px';
    var calBtnLabel=moCalBtn?'YALNIZCA ÜYELER':'RESERVE';
    if(moCalBtn)calBtnStyle='background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);color:var(--muted);padding:8px 14px;font-size:10px;cursor:default';
    var calBtnOnclick=moCalBtn?'':'onclick="openCalForm(\''+se.id+'\')"';
    var posterHtml=se.poster_thumb?'<div style="width:72px;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;border-radius:2px;background:#0a0a0a;position:relative"><img src="'+_esc(se.poster_thumb)+'" style="width:100%;display:block;object-fit:contain"></div>':'';
    var memberTag=isMembersOnly(se)?'<span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:1px;color:'+sc+';background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);border:1px solid '+sc+'33;border-radius:2px;padding:2px 7px;margin-left:8px">ÜYELERE ÖZEL</span>':'';
    var timeRange=se.time+(se.time_end?' — '+se.time_end:'');
    html+='<div class="cal-balloon" id="calBalloon" style="border-color:'+sc+'33"><div class="cal-b-bar" style="background:'+sc+'"></div><div class="cal-b-inner" style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start">'+posterHtml+'<div style="flex:1;min-width:0"><div class="cal-b-date">'+formatEventDate(se.date)+'</div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center"><div class="cal-b-name">'+_esc(se.name)+'</div>'+memberTag+'</div><div class="cal-b-genre">'+_esc(se.genre||'')+'</div>'+(se.subtitle?'<div class="cal-b-quote">"'+_esc(se.subtitle)+'"</div>':'')+'<div class="cal-b-row"><span class="cal-b-time">'+timeRange+'</span><button class="elc-reserve" style="'+calBtnStyle+'" '+calBtnOnclick+'>'+_esc(calBtnLabel)+'</button></div></div></div><div id="cal-form-'+se.id+'" class="cal-form"></div></div>';
  }
  html+='</div>';// /cal-wrap
  // This month
