  var thisMonthEvts=State.events.filter(function(e){if(!e.date)return false;var dp=new Date(e.date+'T12:00:00');return dp.getFullYear()===year&&dp.getMonth()===month;});
  if(thisMonthEvts.length){
    html+='<div class="ctm-wrap"><div class="ctm-lbl">THIS MONTH</div>';
    thisMonthEvts.forEach(function(e){
      var c2=genreColor(e.genre,e.color);
      var day=new Date(e.date+'T12:00:00').getDate();
      html+='<div class="ctm-item" style="border-left-color:'+c2+'" onclick="selEvt(\''+e.id+'\')"><div class="ctm-thumb">'+(e.poster_thumb?'<img src="'+_esc(e.poster_thumb)+'" loading="lazy">':'<div style="width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;color:#1a1a1a">🎵</div>')+'</div><div class="ctm-info"><div class="ctm-n">'+_esc(e.name)+'</div><div class="ctm-g">'+_esc(e.genre||'')+'</div></div><div class="ctm-d" style="color:'+c2+'">'+day+'</div></div>';
    });
    html+='</div>';
  } else {
    html+='<div style="padding-bottom:80px"></div>';
  }
  el.innerHTML=html;
  // Scroll to balloon
  if(State.calSelected){setTimeout(function(){var b=document.getElementById('calBalloon');if(b)b.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest'});},80);}
}

function calTap(ds){
  State.calSelected=(State.calSelected===ds)?null:ds;
  renderCal();
}
function prevMonth(){State.calMonth--;if(State.calMonth<0){State.calMonth=11;State.calYear--;}State.calSelected=null;renderCal();}
function nextMonth(){State.calMonth++;if(State.calMonth>11){State.calMonth=0;State.calYear++;}State.calSelected=null;renderCal();}

// ═══ EVENT SELECTION ═══
function isMembersOnly(evt){return evt.access_type==='members_only';}
function userIsMember(){return State.profile&&State.profile.status==='approved';}

function canAccess(evt){
  if(isMembersOnly(evt)&&!userIsMember())return{allowed:false,reason:'members_only'};
  var p=State.profile;
  if(!p)return{allowed:true,guestMode:true};
  if(p.trust_score<(evt.min_trust||0))return{allowed:false,reason:'trust_too_low'};
  if(evt.access_type==='tier_restricted'){if(TIER_ORDER.indexOf(p.tier)<TIER_ORDER.indexOf(evt.min_tier||'bronze'))return{allowed:false,reason:'tier_insufficient'};}
  if(evt.approved_count>=evt.capacity)return{allowed:false,reason:'full',canWaitlist:true};
  return{allowed:true};
}

function selEvt(id, accentColor){
  var e=State.events.find(function(x){return x.id===id;});
  if(!e)return;
  if(isMembersOnly(e)&&!userIsMember()){showMembersOnlyModal(e);return;}
  State.selectedEventId=id;
  // Update bottom sheet event label (used for cal view)
  var en2=document.getElementById('evtSelNone');if(en2)en2.style.display='none';
  var ed=document.getElementById('evtSelDot');if(ed)ed.style.display='block';
  var et=document.getElementById('evtSelTxt');
  if(et){et.style.display='block';et.innerHTML=_esc(e.name)+'<br><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted)">'+formatEventDate(e.date)+(e.time?' · '+e.time:'')+'</span>';}
  if(State.view==='list'){
    openInlinePanel(id, e, accentColor||genreColor(e.genre));
  } else {
    // Calendar view uses bottom sheet
    var nb=document.getElementById('evtNote');
    if(nb){if(e.note){nb.textContent=e.note;nb.style.display='block';}else nb.style.display='none';}
    var gNote=document.getElementById('guestModeNote');
    if(!State.profile||!userIsMember()){
      if(!gNote){gNote=document.createElement('div');gNote.id='guestModeNote';gNote.style.cssText='background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);border-radius:2px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);line-height:1.8';var rw=document.getElementById('rulesWrap');rw.parentNode.insertBefore(gNote,rw);}
      gNote.textContent=t('guestNote');gNote.style.display='block';
    } else if(gNote){gNote.style.display='none';}
    if(State.profile&&State.profile.status==='approved'){
      var fn=document.getElementById('fName');if(fn&&!fn.value)fn.value=State.profile.name||'';
      var storedPhone=State.profile.phone||'';
      if(storedPhone){var ccMatch=storedPhone.match(/^(\+\d{1,4})(\d+)$/);var fpCC=document.getElementById('fPhoneCC');var fpNum=document.getElementById('fPhone');if(ccMatch&&fpCC&&fpNum){var opts=fpCC.options;for(var oi=0;oi<opts.length;oi++){if(opts[oi].value===ccMatch[1]){fpCC.selectedIndex=oi;break;}}if(!fpNum.value)fpNum.value=ccMatch[2];}else if(fpNum&&!fpNum.value)fpNum.value=storedPhone;}
    }
    showRulesForLang(e);
  }
}

// ═══ INLINE PANEL ═══
var _riCount=1;
function openInlinePanel(id, e, color){
  // Close all panels first
  document.querySelectorAll('.res-inline').forEach(function(p){
    if(p.id!=='ri-'+id){p.classList.remove('open');p.innerHTML='';}
  });
  var panel=document.getElementById('ri-'+id);if(!panel)return;
  var isOpen=panel.classList.contains('open');
  if(isOpen){panel.classList.remove('open');panel.innerHTML='';return;}
  // Build form content
  var gn=State.profile?(_esc(State.profile.name||'')):'';
  var gp=State.profile?(State.profile.phone||''):'';
  var ccVal='+90',numVal=gp;
  if(gp){var cm=gp.match(/^(\+\d{1,4})(\d+)$/);if(cm){ccVal=cm[1];numVal=cm[2];}}
  var phOpts='<option value="+90"'+(ccVal==='+90'?' selected':'')+'>🇹🇷 +90</option><option value="+7"'+(ccVal==='+7'?' selected':'')+'>🇷🇺 +7</option><option value="+1"'+(ccVal==='+1'?' selected':'')+'>🇺🇸 +1</option><option value="+44"'+(ccVal==='+44'?' selected':'')+'>🇬🇧 +44</option><option value="+49"'+(ccVal==='+49'?' selected':'')+'>🇩🇪 +49</option><option value="+33"'+(ccVal==='+33'?' selected':'')+'>🇫🇷 +33</option><option value="+39"'+(ccVal==='+39'?' selected':'')+'>🇮🇹 +39</option><option value="+34"'+(ccVal==='+34'?' selected':'')+'>🇪🇸 +34</option><option value="+31"'+(ccVal==='+31'?' selected':'')+'>🇳🇱 +31</option><option value="+41"'+(ccVal==='+41'?' selected':'')+'>🇨🇭 +41</option><option value="+43"'+(ccVal==='+43'?' selected':'')+'>🇦🇹 +43</option><option value="+48"'+(ccVal==='+48'?' selected':'')+'>🇵🇱 +48</option><option value="+380"'+(ccVal==='+380'?' selected':'')+'>🇺🇦 +380</option><option value="+30"'+(ccVal==='+30'?' selected':'')+'>🇬🇷 +30</option><option value="+972"'+(ccVal==='+972'?' selected':'')+'>🇮🇱 +972</option><option value="+971"'+(ccVal==='+971'?' selected':'')+'>🇦🇪 +971</option><option value="+98"'+(ccVal==='+98'?' selected':'')+'>🇮🇷 +98</option>';
  var guestNote=(!State.profile||!userIsMember())?'<div style="background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);border-radius:2px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);line-height:1.8">'+t('guestNote')+'</div>':'';
  var rulesHtml='';
  if(e.rules){rulesHtml='<div style="background:#060f14;border:1px solid #0d2035;border-left:3px solid var(--blue);border-radius:2px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:14px"><div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:10px;color:#6899bb;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:12px;white-space:pre-line" id="ri-rules-'+id+'">'+_esc(e.rules)+'</div><label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #0d2035"><input type="checkbox" id="ri-check-'+id+'" style="width:18px;height:18px;accent-color:var(--blue);cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px"><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#6899bb;line-height:1.7">🔵 '+t('rulesLbl')+'</span></label></div>';}
  var noteHtml=e.note?'<div style="background:#070707;border:1px solid var(--dim);border-left:3px solid var(--muted);border-radius:2px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8">'+_esc(e.note)+'</div>':'';
  var schedHtml='';
  if(e.warmup_name||e.time_end){
    schedHtml='<div style="background:#080808;border:1px solid var(--dim);border-left:3px solid '+color+';border-radius:2px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:14px">';
    if(e.warmup_name){schedHtml+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dim)"><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);min-width:88px">'+(e.warmup_start||e.time||'')+(e.warmup_end?' — '+e.warmup_end:'')+'</span><span style="font-family:DM Sans,sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;font-weight:400">'+_esc(e.warmup_name)+'</span><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(--dim);margin-left:auto">WARM-UP</span></div>';}
    schedHtml+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px"><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--white);min-width:88px">'+(e.warmup_end||e.time||'')+(e.time_end?' — '+e.time_end:'')+'</span><span style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--white);font-weight:900">'+_esc(e.name)+'</span><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);margin-left:auto">MAIN</span></div>';
    schedHtml+='</div>';
  }
  panel.innerHTML='<div class="ril-inner" style="border-left-color:'+color+'">'+
    noteHtml+schedHtml+guestNote+
    '<div class="f"><label>'+t('nameLbl')+'</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="ri-name-'+id+'" value="'+gn+'" placeholder="Adınız" autocomplete="name"></div>'+
    '<div class="f"><label>'+t('phoneLbl')+'</label><div class="ril-ph"><select class="ril-cc" id="ri-cc-'+id+'">'+phOpts+'</select><input class="ril-num fi" type="tel" id="ri-phone-'+id+'" value="'+numVal+'" placeholder="5xxxxxxxxx" inputmode="numeric" maxlength="15"></div></div>'+
    '<div class="f"><label>'+t('guestsLbl')+'</label><div class="count-row"><button class="cnt-btn" onclick="rilChg(\''+id+'\',-1)">−</button><div class="cnt-val" id="ri-cnt-'+id+'">1</div><button class="cnt-btn" onclick="rilChg(\''+id+'\',1)">+</button></div></div>'+
    '<div id="ri-guests-'+id+'"></div>'+
    rulesHtml+
    '<button class="btn" id="ri-btn-'+id+'" onclick="doResInline(\''+id+'\')"><span id="ri-btntxt-'+id+'">'+t('resBtn')+'</span></button>'+
  '</div>';
  panel.classList.add('open');
  // Translate rules if needed
  if(e.rules&&State.lang!=='tr'){translateRules(id,e.rules,State.lang,document.getElementById('ri-rules-'+id));}
  // Scroll card into view
  setTimeout(function(){
    var card=document.querySelector('[data-eid="'+id+'"].evt-list-card');
    if(card)card.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
  },50);
}

var _rilCounts={};
function rilChg(id,d){
  _rilCounts[id]=Math.max(1,Math.min(20,(_rilCounts[id]||1)+d));
  var cv=document.getElementById('ri-cnt-'+id);if(cv)cv.textContent=_rilCounts[id];
  var wrap=document.getElementById('ri-guests-'+id);if(!wrap)return;
  wrap.innerHTML='';
  for(var i=1;i<_rilCounts[id];i++){
    var div=document.createElement('div');div.className='f';
    var lbl=document.createElement('label');lbl.textContent=i+'. MİSAFİR ADI SOYADI';
    var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.className='fi';inp.type='text';inp.id='ri-guest-'+id+'-'+i;inp.placeholder=i+'. misafir';
    div.appendChild(lbl);div.appendChild(inp);wrap.appendChild(div);
  }
}

async function doResInline(id){
  var e=State.events.find(function(x){return x.id===id;});if(!e)return;
  if(isMembersOnly(e)&&!userIsMember()){showMembersOnlyModal(e);return;}
  var isGuest=!State.session||!State.profile||State.profile.status!=='approved';
  var name=(document.getElementById('ri-name-'+id)||{}).value||'';name=name.trim();
  var cc=(document.getElementById('ri-cc-'+id)||{}).value||'+90';
  var num=(document.getElementById('ri-phone-'+id)||{}).value||'';num=num.trim();
  var phone=num?(cc+num):'';
  if(!name){toast('İsim zorunludur');return;}
  if(!phone){toast('Telefon zorunludur');return;}
  var count=_rilCounts[id]||1;
  var chk=document.getElementById('ri-check-'+id);
  if(e.rules&&chk&&!chk.checked){
    var rw=chk.closest('[style]');if(rw)rw.style.borderLeftColor='var(--red)';
    setTimeout(function(){if(rw)rw.style.borderLeftColor='';},2000);
    toast('Lütfen etkinlik kurallarını onaylayın');return;
  }
  var access=canAccess(e);
  if(!access.allowed&&access.reason!=='members_only'){
    if(access.canWaitlist){await joinWaitlist(e.id);return;}
    toast({trust_too_low:'Güven skorunuz yetersiz',tier_insufficient:'Üyelik seviyeniz yetersiz',full:'Kapasite doldu'}[access.reason]||'Erişim yok');return;
  }
  var guestNames=[];
  for(var gi=1;gi<count;gi++){var gInp=document.getElementById('ri-guest-'+id+'-'+gi);if(gInp){var gv=gInp.value.trim();if(!gv){toast(gi+'. misafirin adını girin');return;}guestNames.push(gv);}}
  setLoading('ri-btn-'+id,'ri-btntxt-'+id,t('resBtn'),true);
  var qrId='NIP-'+randomHex(8).toUpperCase();
  var insertData={qr_id:qrId,event_id:id,event_name:e.name,event_date:e.date,event_time:e.time||'',name:name,phone:phone,guest_count:count,guest_names:guestNames,status:'pending',rules_accepted:chk?chk.checked:false};
  if(!isGuest&&State.session)insertData.profile_id=State.session.user.id;
  var ins=await _SB.from('reservations').insert(insertData).select().single();
  setLoading('ri-btn-'+id,'ri-btntxt-'+id,t('resBtn'),false);
  if(ins.error){if(ins.error.code==='23505')toast('Bu etkinliğe zaten kayıt yaptırdınız');else toast('Hata: '+ins.error.message);return;}
  toast('Rezervasyon talebiniz alındı ✓');
  // Close panel
  var panel=document.getElementById('ri-'+id);if(panel){panel.classList.remove('open');setTimeout(function(){panel.innerHTML='';},400);}
  _rilCounts[id]=1;
  if(!isGuest){G('s-tickets');openTickets();}
}

function showMembersOnlyModal(e){
  var overlay=document.getElementById('membersOnlyOverlay');
  if(!overlay){overlay=document.createElement('div');overlay.id='membersOnlyOverlay';overlay.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:90;background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center';overlay.innerHTML='<div style="background:var(--black);border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:14px 14px 0 0;width:100%;max-width:480px;padding:32px 24px;padding-bottom:max(40px,var(--safe-bottom));animation:slideUp .3s ease"><div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:24px"><div style="font-size:36px;margin-bottom:12px">🔒</div><div style="margin-bottom:6px"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NOT IN PARIS" style="height:20px;filter:sepia(1) saturate(5) hue-rotate(5deg) brightness(.9);display:block;margin:0 auto"></div><div class="t-brand" style="font-size:18px;letter-spacing:4px;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--gold)">MEMBERS ONLY</div><div class="t-mono" style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.9" id="moSub"></div></div><button class="btn" onclick="closeAuthModal();showAuthModal();" style="margin-bottom:10px">ÜYE GİR / BAŞVUR</button><button class="btn-sm" onclick="document.getElementById(\'membersOnlyOverlay\').style.display=\'none\'" style="width:100%;margin-top:8px">Vazgeç</button></div>';document.body.appendChild(overlay);}
  setTxt('moSub',t('membersOnlySub'));overlay.style.display='flex';
}

async function showRulesForLang(e){
  var rw=document.getElementById('rulesWrap'),rt=document.getElementById('rulesText'),rc=document.getElementById('rulesCheck');
  if(rc)rc.checked=false;
  if(!e.rules||!rw||!rt){if(rw)rw.style.display='none';return;}
  rw.style.display='block';
  if(State.rulesCache[e.id]&&State.rulesCache[e.id][State.lang]){rt.textContent=State.rulesCache[e.id][State.lang];return;}
  rt.textContent=e.rules;
  if(State.lang==='tr'){if(!State.rulesCache[e.id])State.rulesCache[e.id]={};State.rulesCache[e.id].tr=e.rules;return;}
  translateRules(e.id,e.rules,State.lang,rt);
}

async function translateRules(eventId,rulesText,targetLang,el){
  if(State.rulesCache[eventId]&&State.rulesCache[eventId][targetLang]){if(el)el.textContent=State.rulesCache[eventId][targetLang];return;}
  if(!State.rulesCache[eventId])State.rulesCache[eventId]={};
  try{
    var pair={en:'tr|en',ru:'tr|ru'}[targetLang]||'tr|en';
    var lines=rulesText.split('\n').filter(function(l){return l.trim();});
    var translated=[];
    for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){
      try{
        var url='https://api.mymemory.translated.net/get?q='+encodeURIComponent(lines[i].trim())+'&langpair='+pair;
        var r=await fetch(url);var d=await r.json();
        translated.push(d.responseData&&d.responseData.translatedText?d.responseData.translatedText:lines[i]);
      }catch(e2){translated.push(lines[i]);}
    }
    var result=translated.join('\n');
    State.rulesCache[eventId][targetLang]=result;
    if(State.lang===targetLang&&el)el.textContent=result;
  }catch(e){if(el)el.textContent=rulesText;}
}

// ═══ SHEET ═══
// Sheet removed - using inline panels only

// ═══ GUESTS ═══
function chgCnt(d){
  State.guestCount=Math.max(1,Math.min(20,State.guestCount+d));
  var cv=document.getElementById('cntVal');if(cv)cv.textContent=State.guestCount;
  renderGuestFields();
}
function renderGuestFields(){
  var wrap=document.getElementById('guestNamesWrap');if(!wrap)return;
  wrap.innerHTML='';
  for(var i=1;i<State.guestCount;i++){
    var div=document.createElement('div');div.className='f';
    var lbl=document.createElement('label');lbl.textContent=i+'. MİSAFİR ADI SOYADI';
    var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.className='fi';inp.type='text';inp.id='fGuest'+i;inp.placeholder=i+'. misafir (zorunlu)';inp.required=true;
    div.appendChild(lbl);div.appendChild(inp);wrap.appendChild(div);
  }
}

// ═══ RESERVATION ═══
async function doRes(){
  if(!State.selectedEventId){toast('Lütfen bir etkinlik seçin');return;}
  var e=State.events.find(function(x){return x.id===State.selectedEventId;});
  if(e&&isMembersOnly(e)&&!userIsMember()){showMembersOnlyModal(e);return;}
  var isGuest=!State.session||!State.profile||State.profile.status!=='approved';
  var name=val('fName').trim(),resCC=val('fPhoneCC')||'+90',resNum=val('fPhone').trim(),phone=resNum?(resCC+resNum):'';
  if(!name){toast('İsim zorunludur');return;}
  if(!phone){toast('Telefon zorunludur');return;}
  var rw=document.getElementById('rulesWrap'),rc=document.getElementById('rulesCheck');
  if(rw&&rw.style.display!=='none'&&rc&&!rc.checked){rw.style.borderLeftColor='var(--red)';setTimeout(function(){rw.style.borderLeftColor='';},2000);toast('Lütfen etkinlik kurallarını onaylayın');return;}
  if(e){var access=canAccess(e);if(!access.allowed&&access.reason!=='members_only'){if(access.canWaitlist){await joinWaitlist(e.id);return;}toast({trust_too_low:'Güven skorunuz yetersiz',tier_insufficient:'Üyelik seviyeniz yetersiz',full:'Kapasite doldu'}[access.reason]||'Erişim yok');return;}}
  var guestNames=[];
  for(var gi=1;gi<State.guestCount;gi++){var gInp=document.getElementById('fGuest'+gi);if(gInp){var gv=gInp.value.trim();if(!gv){toast(gi+'. misafirin adını girin');return;}guestNames.push(gv);}}
  setLoading('subBtn','subBtnTxt',t('resBtn'),true);
  var qrId='NIP-'+randomHex(8).toUpperCase();
  var insertData={qr_id:qrId,event_id:State.selectedEventId,event_name:e?e.name:'',event_date:e?e.date:null,event_time:e?e.time:'',name:name,phone:phone,guest_count:State.guestCount,guest_names:guestNames,status:'pending',rules_accepted:rc?rc.checked:false};
  if(!isGuest&&State.session)insertData.profile_id=State.session.user.id;
  var ins=await _SB.from('reservations').insert(insertData).select().single();
  setLoading('subBtn','subBtnTxt',t('resBtn'),false);
  if(ins.error){if(ins.error.code==='23505')toast('Bu etkinliğe zaten kayıt yaptırdınız');else toast('Hata: '+ins.error.message);return;}
  toast('Rezervasyon talebiniz alındı ✓');closeSheet();
  if(!isGuest){G('s-tickets');openTickets();}else{var fn2=document.getElementById('fName');if(fn2)fn2.value='';var fp2=document.getElementById('fPhone');if(fp2)fp2.value='';resetSheet();}
}

async function joinWaitlist(eventId){
  if(!State.session){showAuthModal();return;}
  var p=State.profile;
  var priorityScore=(p?p.trust_score:0)+Math.floor(((p?p.loyalty_score:0)/10));
  var pos=await _SB.from('waitlist').select('id',{count:'exact',head:true}).eq('event_id',eventId).eq('status','waiting');
  var position=(pos.count||0)+1;
  var ins=await _SB.from('waitlist').insert({event_id:eventId,profile_id:State.session.user.id,position,priority_score:priorityScore,status:'waiting'});
  if(ins.error&&ins.error.code==='23505'){toast('Zaten bekleme listesindeydiniz');return;}
  if(ins.error){toast('Hata: '+ins.error.message);return;}
  toast('Bekleme listesine eklendiniz — Sıra: '+position);
}

// ═══ TICKETS ═══
async function openTickets(){
  if(!State.session){showAuthModal();return;}
  G('s-tickets');
  var el=document.getElementById('ticketsList');el.innerHTML='<div class="page-spin"></div>';
  var res=await _SB.from('reservations').select('*,dj_rating,rated_at,checked_in_at').eq('profile_id',State.session.user.id).order('created_at',{ascending:false});
  renderTickets(res.data||[],el);
  if(State.ticketSub)_SB.removeChannel(State.ticketSub);
  State.ticketSub=_SB.channel('my-tickets-'+State.session.user.id)
    .on('postgres_changes',{event:'UPDATE',schema:'public',table:'reservations',filter:'profile_id=eq.'+State.session.user.id},function(){openTickets();toast('🎉 Rezervasyon durumunuz güncellendi!');})
    .subscribe();
}

function renderTickets(data,el){
  if(!data.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty">Henüz rezervasyon yok.<br>Bir etkinlik seçerek başla ↑</div>';return;}
  el.innerHTML='';
  data.forEach(function(r){
    var bc={pending:'p',approved:'a',rejected:'r',used:'u',no_show:'r',cancelled:'u'}[r.status]||'u';
    var bt={pending:'BEKLEMEDE',approved:'ONAYLANDI',rejected:'REDDEDİLDİ',used:'KULLANILDI',no_show:'GELMEDİ',cancelled:'İPTAL'}[r.status]||r.status;
    var card=document.createElement('div');card.className='t-card';
    var hd=document.createElement('div');hd.className='t-card-head';
    var hn=document.createElement('span');hn.className='t-card-name';hn.textContent=r.event_name||'—';
    var hb=document.createElement('span');hb.className='badge '+bc;hb.textContent=bt;
    hd.appendChild(hn);hd.appendChild(hb);card.appendChild(hd);
    var bd=document.createElement('div');bd.className='t-card-body';
    bd.innerHTML='<div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">TARİH</span><span class="t-card-val">'+fmtDate(r.event_date)+(r.event_time?' · '+r.event_time:'')+'</span></div><div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">İSİM</span><span class="t-card-val">'+_esc(r.name||'—')+'</span></div><div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">KİŞİ</span><span class="t-card-val">'+(r.guest_count||1)+' kişi</span></div>';
    if(r.guest_names&&r.guest_names.length)bd.innerHTML+='<div class="t-card-row"><span class="t-card-lbl">MİSAFİRLER</span><span class="t-card-val" style="font-size:8px">'+r.guest_names.map(_esc).join(', ')+'</span></div>';
    card.appendChild(bd);
    if(r.status==='approved'){
      var qz=document.createElement('div');qz.className='t-card-qr';
      var qw=document.createElement('div');qw.style.cssText='background:white;padding:10px;border-radius:2px';qw.id='tqr-'+r.id;
      var qi=document.createElement('div');qi.className='t-mono';qi.style.cssText='font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:3px;margin-top:8px';qi.textContent=r.qr_id||'';
      var warn=document.createElement('div');warn.style.cssText='font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.3);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:2px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:6px';warn.textContent='⚡ TEK KULLANIMLIK QR';
      qz.appendChild(qw);qz.appendChild(qi);qz.appendChild(warn);card.appendChild(qz);
      setTimeout(function(){var qel=document.getElementById('tqr-'+r.id);if(qel&&!qel.hasChildNodes()&&r.qr_id){try{new QRCode(qel,{text:r.qr_id,width:160,height:160,colorDark:'#000',colorLight:'#fff',correctLevel:QRCode.CorrectLevel.M});}catch(e){}}},120);
    } else if(r.status==='used'){
      // USED: big green pass + DJ rating
      var passDiv=document.createElement('div');
      passDiv.style.cssText='background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a1f0e 0%,#061409 100%);border-top:1px solid rgba(61,155,90,.25);padding:18px 16px 14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden';
      passDiv.innerHTML='<div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--green)"></div>'+
        '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px">'+
        '<div style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(61,155,90,.15);border:2px solid var(--green);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0">'+
        '<svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12" stroke="#3D9B5A" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>'+
        '<div><div style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--green);line-height:1">GİRİŞ YAPILDI</div>'+
        '<div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:rgba(61,155,90,.6);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:2px">'+(r.checked_in_at?new Date(r.checked_in_at).toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}):'')+'</div></div></div>';
      // Star rating section
      var today=new Date();var evDate=r.event_date?new Date(r.event_date+'T23:59:59'):null;
      var canRate=evDate&&today>evDate;
      var ratingDiv=document.createElement('div');
      ratingDiv.style.cssText='border-top:1px solid rgba(61,155,90,.1);padding-top:12px;margin-top:2px';
      if(r.dj_rating){
        ratingDiv.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:rgba(61,155,90,.5);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px">PUANINIZ</div>'+
          '<div style="display:flex;gap:4px">'+[1,2,3,4,5].map(function(s){return '<div style="font-size:22px;'+(s<=r.dj_rating?'filter:none':'opacity:.2')+'">★</div>';}).join('')+'</div>';
      } else if(canRate){
        ratingDiv.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:rgba(61,155,90,.5);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:8px">DJ PUANA\u011e\u0130T</div>'+
          '<div style="display:flex;gap:6px" id="stars-'+r.id+'">'+[1,2,3,4,5].map(function(s){return '<button onclick="rateDJ(\''+r.id+'\','+s+')" style="font-size:26px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:0;opacity:.3;transition:all .15s;line-height:1">★</button>';}).join('')+'</div>';
      } else if(!canRate&&evDate){
        ratingDiv.innerHTML='<div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px;color:rgba(61,155,90,.3);letter-spacing:1px">ETKİNLİK SONRASI PUANLA</div>';
      }
      passDiv.appendChild(ratingDiv);
      card.appendChild(passDiv);
    } else {
      var sb=document.createElement('div');sb.className='t-status-box';
      if(r.status==='pending')sb.style.cssText='background:rgba(201,168,76,.05);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.12)';
      else if(r.status==='rejected'||r.status==='no_show')sb.style.cssText='background:rgba(192,57,43,.05);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.1)';
      else sb.style.cssText='background:rgba(100,100,100,.05);color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--dim)';
      sb.textContent={pending:'⏳ Onay bekleniyor',rejected:'✕ Reddedildi',no_show:'— Gelmedi',cancelled:'İptal'}[r.status]||r.status;
      card.appendChild(sb);
    }
    // Star hover effect for pending ratings
    el.appendChild(card);
  });
}

async function rateDJ(resId, rating){
  var stars=document.getElementById('stars-'+resId);
  if(!stars)return;
  // Optimistic update
  var btns=stars.querySelectorAll('button');
  btns.forEach(function(b,i){b.style.opacity=i<rating?'1':'0.2';b.disabled=true;});
  var res=await _SB.from('reservations').update({dj_rating:rating,rated_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',resId);
  if(res.error){toast('Hata: '+res.error.message);return;}
  toast('Puanınız kaydedildi ✓');
  // Refresh tickets to show saved state
  openTickets();
}

// ═══ PROFILE ═══
async function loadProfilePage(){
  G('s-profile');
  var el=document.getElementById('profileContent');el.innerHTML='<div class="page-spin"></div>';
  await loadProfile();var p=State.profile;
  if(!p){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty">Profil yüklenemedi.</div>';return;}
  var ledger=await _SB.from('reputation_ledger').select('score_type,delta,balance_after,reason_code,created_at').eq('profile_id',p.id).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(15);
  var tier=(TIER_LABELS[State.lang]||TIER_LABELS.tr)[p.tier]||p.tier;
  var tierColor={'bronze':'var(--bronze)','silver':'var(--silver)','gold':'var(--goldtier)','elite':'var(--elite)'}[p.tier]||'var(--white)';
  var tierRanges={bronze:{min:0,max:149,next:'MÜDAVİM',nextMin:150},silver:{min:150,max:299,next:'DEMİRBAŞ',nextMin:300},gold:{min:300,max:499,next:'KOMUTAN',nextMin:500},elite:{min:500,max:500,next:'MAX',nextMin:500}};
  var tr2=tierRanges[p.tier]||tierRanges.bronze;
  var tierPct=p.tier==='elite'?100:Math.min(100,Math.round(((p.trust_score-tr2.min)/(tr2.max-tr2.min+1))*100));
  var attRate=p.total_reservations>0?Math.round((p.total_attended/p.total_reservations)*100):100;
  function scoreBars(val2,max,color){var pct=Math.min(100,Math.round((val2/max)*100));var filled=Math.round(pct/10);var bars='';for(var i=0;i<10;i++)bars+='<div style="flex:1;height:6px;border-radius:1px;background:'+(i<filled?color:'var(--dim)')+'"></div>';return '<div style="display:flex;gap:3px;margin-top:6px">'+bars+'</div>';}
  el.innerHTML='<div style="padding:16px 16px 80px">'+
  '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px">'+
    '<div style="position:relative;flex-shrink:0" onclick="triggerAvatarUpload()">'+(p.avatar_url?'<img src="'+_esc(p.avatar_url)+'" style="width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid '+tierColor+';display:block">':'<div style="width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--mid);border:2px solid '+tierColor+';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:28px">👤</div>')+'<div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;right:0;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--black);border:1px solid var(--dim);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;cursor:pointer">✏️</div></div>'+
    '<div style="flex:1;min-width:0"><div style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:24px;letter-spacing:1px;line-height:1.1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">'+_esc(p.name)+'</div>'+(p.member_code?'<div class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:3px">'+p.member_code+'</div>':'')+'<span class="tier-badge '+(TIER_COLORS[p.tier]||'tier-bronze')+'" style="margin-top:8px;display:inline-block;font-size:9px">'+tier+'</span></div>'+
  '</div>'+
  '<input type="file" id="avatarFileInput" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="uploadAvatar(event)">'+
  '<div style="background:var(--grey);border:1px solid var(--mid);border-radius:2px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px">'+
    '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px"><span class="t-label">SEVİYE İLERLEMESİ</span>'+(p.tier!=='elite'?'<span class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted)">→ '+tr2.next+': '+(tr2.max+1-p.trust_score)+' puan</span>':'<span class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--elite)">MAX SEVİYE ✓</span>')+'</div>'+
    '<div style="background:var(--dim);border-radius:2px;height:5px;overflow:hidden"><div style="width:'+tierPct+'%;height:100%;background:'+tierColor+';border-radius:2px;transition:width 1s ease"></div></div>'+
    '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:4px"><span class="t-mono" style="font-size:7px;color:var(--dim)">'+tr2.min+'</span><span class="t-mono" style="font-size:7px;color:var(--dim)">'+(p.tier==='elite'?'∞':tr2.max+1)+'</span></div>'+
  '</div>'+
  '<div style="background:var(--grey);border:1px solid var(--mid);border-radius:2px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px">'+
    '<div style="margin-bottom:16px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline"><span class="t-label">PUAN</span><span style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:28px;color:'+tierColor+'">'+p.trust_score+'<span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)">/500</span></span></div>'+scoreBars(p.trust_score,500,tierColor)+'</div>'+
    '<div style="margin-bottom:16px"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline"><span class="t-label">SADAKAT</span><span style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:28px;color:var(--blue)">'+p.loyalty_score+'</span></div>'+scoreBars(p.loyalty_score,Math.max(1000,p.loyalty_score),'var(--blue)')+'</div>'+
    '<div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline"><span class="t-label">DEVAM ORANI</span><span style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:28px;color:var(--green)">%'+attRate+'</span></div>'+scoreBars(attRate,100,'var(--green)')+'</div>'+
  '</div>'+
  '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px">'+
    '<div class="rep-stat"><div class="rep-num g">'+p.total_attended+'</div><div class="rep-lbl">KATILIM</div></div>'+
    '<div class="rep-stat"><div class="rep-num '+(p.attendance_streak>0?'gold':'')+'">'+p.attendance_streak+'🔥</div><div class="rep-lbl">SERİ</div></div>'+
    '<div class="rep-stat"><div class="rep-num '+(p.total_no_show>0?'r':'g')+'">'+p.total_no_show+'</div><div class="rep-lbl">GELMEME</div></div>'+
  '</div>'+
  (p.referral_code?'<div style="background:var(--grey);border:1px solid var(--mid);border-radius:2px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px"><div class="t-label" style="margin-bottom:10px">REFERANS KODUN</div><div class="code-box">'+p.referral_code+'</div><div class="t-mono" style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-top:6px">'+((p.referral_limit||3)-(p.referral_used||0))+' davet hakkı kaldı</div><button class="btn-sm" style="width:100%;margin-top:10px" onclick="copyRef()">🔗 Davet Linkini Kopyala</button></div>':'')+
  (ledger.data&&ledger.data.length?'<div style="background:var(--grey);border:1px solid var(--mid);border-radius:2px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px"><div class="t-label" style="margin-bottom:12px">PUAN GEÇMİŞİ</div>'+ledger.data.map(function(l){var reasons={attended:'Etkinliğe katıldın',attended_streak:'Seri bonusu',no_show:'Gelmeme cezası',approved:'Üyelik onaylandı',admin_adjustment:'Admin düzeltmesi',migration_initial:'Başlangıç puanı'};return '<div class="ledger-row"><div><div class="ledger-reason">'+(reasons[l.reason_code]||_esc(l.reason_code||'—'))+'</div><div class="t-mono" style="font-size:7px;color:var(--dim)">'+fmtDate(l.created_at?l.created_at.split('T')[0]:'')+'</div></div><div class="ledger-delta '+(l.delta>=0?'pos':'neg')+'">'+(l.delta>=0?'+':'')+l.delta+'</div></div>';}).join('')+'</div>':'')
  +'</div>';
}

// ═══ AVATAR ═══
function triggerAvatarUpload(){var inp=document.getElementById('avatarFileInput');if(inp)inp.click();}
async function uploadAvatar(e){
  var f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;if(!State.session){toast('Giriş yapın');return;}
  toast('Fotoğraf yükleniyor...');
  compressAvatar(f,async function(b64){
    var res=await _SB.from('profiles').update({avatar_url:b64}).eq('id',State.session.user.id);
    if(res.error){toast('Hata: '+res.error.message);return;}
    toast('Profil fotoğrafı güncellendi ✓');await loadProfile();loadProfilePage();
  });
}
function compressAvatar(file,cb){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){var img=new Image();img.onload=function(){var canvas=document.createElement('canvas');var size=200;var w=img.width,h=img.height;var minDim=Math.min(w,h);var sx=(w-minDim)/2,sy=(h-minDim)/2;canvas.width=size;canvas.height=size;canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(img,sx,sy,minDim,minDim,0,0,size,size);cb(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.72));};img.src=ev.target.result;};r.readAsDataURL(file);}

// ═══ REFERRAL ═══
function copyRef(){
  var p=State.profile;if(!p||!p.referral_code){toast('Referans kodunuz yok');return;}
  var url=location.href.split('?')[0]+'?ref='+p.referral_code;
  if(navigator.clipboard){navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function(){toast('Referans linki kopyalandı ✓');});}
  else{var ta=document.createElement('textarea');ta.value=url;document.body.appendChild(ta);ta.select();try{document.execCommand('copy');toast('Kopyalandı ✓');}catch(e){}document.body.removeChild(ta);}
}

// ═══ AUTH MODAL ═══
function showAuthModal(){var m=document.getElementById('authModal');if(m)m.classList.add('show');setTimeout(function(){var em=document.getElementById('modalEmail');if(em)em.focus();},200);}
function closeAuthModal(){var m=document.getElementById('authModal');if(m)m.classList.remove('show');}
async function doModalLogin(){
  var email=val('modalEmail').toLowerCase().trim(),pw=val('modalPw');
  setErr('modalErr','');
  if(!email||!pw){setErr('modalErr',t('errFields'));return;}
  setLoading('modalLoginBtn','modalBtnTxt','GİRİŞ YAP',true);
  var res=await _SB.auth.signInWithPassword({email,password:pw});
  setLoading('modalLoginBtn','modalBtnTxt','GİRİŞ YAP',false);
  if(res.error){setErr('modalErr',t('errInvalid'));return;}
  State.session=res.data.session;await loadProfile();
  if(!State.profile||State.profile.status!=='approved'){setErr('modalErr','Hesap onaylı değil');return;}
  closeAuthModal();showMemberMode(State.profile);await doRes();
}

// ═══ ADMIN AUTH ═══
async function doAdminLogin(){
  var user=val('adminUser').trim(),pw=val('adminPw');
  setErr('adminLoginErr','');
  if(!user||!pw){setErr('adminLoginErr','Gerekli alanları doldurun');return;}
  var res=await _SB.from('settings').select('value').eq('key','admin_credentials').single();
  var creds={username:'Baycura',password:'gulsenabdullah'};
  if(res.data&&res.data.value){try{creds=JSON.parse(res.data.value);}catch(e){}}
  if(user!==creds.username||pw!==creds.password){setErr('adminLoginErr','Geçersiz bilgiler');return;}
  State.isAdmin=true;G('s-admin');aTab('ov');
}
function doAdminLogout(){State.isAdmin=false;G('s-login');}

function aTab(tab){
  var tabs=['ov','mb','ev','rs','qr','st'];
  document.querySelectorAll('.a-tab').forEach(function(x,i){x.classList.toggle('active',tabs[i]===tab);});
  document.querySelectorAll('.a-panel').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('active');});
  var panel=document.getElementById('ap-'+tab);if(panel)panel.classList.add('active');
  if(tab==='ov'){renderAdminStats();renderRecM();renderRecR();}
  if(tab==='mb'){renderMStats();renderM();}
  if(tab==='ev'){renderEvts();}
  if(tab==='rs'){renderRes();populateEvtFilter();}
  if(tab==='st'){loadBranding();}
  if(tab!=='qr')stopCam();
}
function toggleMembersOnlyField(){var acc=val('neAccess');var tierSel=document.getElementById('neMinTier');if(tierSel)tierSel.style.display=acc==='tier_restricted'?'':'none';}

// ═══ ADMIN STATS ═══
async function renderAdminStats(){
  var [r1,r2]=await Promise.all([_SB.from('profiles').select('status'),_SB.from('reservations').select('status')]);
  var ms=r1.data||[],rs=r2.data||[];
  document.getElementById('admStats').innerHTML='<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n gold">'+ms.filter(function(m){return m.status==='pending';}).length+'</div><div class="stat-l">BEKLEYEN ÜYE</div></div><div class="stat"><div class="stat-n g">'+ms.filter(function(m){return m.status==='approved';}).length+'</div><div class="stat-l">ONAYLANDI</div></div><div class="stat"><div class="stat-n r">'+rs.filter(function(r){return r.status==='pending';}).length+'</div><div class="stat-l">REZ. BEKLİYOR</div></div>';
}
async function renderMStats(){
  var res=await _SB.from('profiles').select('status');var data=res.data||[];
  document.getElementById('mStats').innerHTML='<div class="stat"><div class="stat-n gold">'+data.filter(function(m){return m.status==='pending';}).length+'</div><div class="stat-l">BEKLEYEN</div></div><div class="stat"><div class="stat-n g">'+data.filter(function(m){return m.status==='approved';}).length+'</div><div class="stat-l">ONAYLANDI</div></div><div class="stat"><div class="stat-n b">'+data.length+'</div><div class="stat-l">TOPLAM</div></div>';
}
async function renderRecM(){var res=await _SB.from('profiles').select('id,name,email,status,tier,trust_score,member_code,referral_code,phone,instagram,referral_used,referral_limit,ref_by').order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(5);renderMemberCards(res.data||[],'recM');}
async function renderM(){var q=_SB.from('profiles').select('id,name,email,status,tier,trust_score,loyalty_score,member_code,referral_code,phone,instagram,referral_used,referral_limit,total_attended,total_no_show,ref_by').order('created_at',{ascending:false});if(State.memberFilter)q=q.eq('status',State.memberFilter);var res=await q;renderMemberCards(res.data||[],'mList');}

function renderMemberCards(list,cid){
  var el=document.getElementById(cid);if(!el)return;
  if(!list.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty">Kayıt yok.</div>';return;}
  el.innerHTML='';
  list.forEach(function(m){
    var bc={pending:'p',approved:'a',rejected:'r',frozen:'f'}[m.status]||'u';
    var bt={pending:'BEKLEMEDE',approved:'ONAYLANDI',rejected:'REDDEDİLDİ',frozen:'DONDURULDU',banned:'BANLANDI'}[m.status]||m.status;
    var card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card';
    var hdr=document.createElement('div');hdr.className='card-h';hdr.onclick=function(){this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open');};
    var nd=document.createElement('div');nd.style.cssText='flex:1;min-width:0';
    var ne=document.createElement('div');ne.className='card-name';ne.textContent=m.name||'—';
    var mt=document.createElement('div');mt.className='card-meta';mt.innerHTML=_esc(m.email||'')+(m.phone?' · '+_esc(m.phone):'')+' / '+(m.ref_by?'Ref: '+_esc(m.ref_by):'Direkt')+(m.status==='approved'?' · Güven: '+(m.trust_score||100):'');
    var bg=document.createElement('span');bg.className='badge '+bc;bg.textContent=bt;
    nd.appendChild(ne);nd.appendChild(mt);hdr.appendChild(nd);hdr.appendChild(bg);card.appendChild(hdr);
    var body=document.createElement('div');body.className='card-body';
    if(m.status==='pending'){var b1=document.createElement('button');b1.className='act-btn approve';b1.textContent='✓ ONAYLA';b1.onclick=function(){approveMember(m.id,cid);};body.appendChild(b1);var b2=document.createElement('button');b2.className='act-btn reject';b2.textContent='✕ REDDET';b2.onclick=function(){rejectMember(m.id,cid);};body.appendChild(b2);}
    if(m.status==='approved'){var bf=document.createElement('button');bf.className='act-btn freeze';bf.textContent='❄ DONDUR';bf.onclick=function(){freezeMember(m.id,cid);};body.appendChild(bf);}
    if(m.status==='frozen'){var bu=document.createElement('button');bu.className='act-btn approve';bu.textContent='▶ ÇÖZDÜR';bu.onclick=function(){approveMember(m.id,cid);};body.appendChild(bu);}
    var bdl=document.createElement('button');bdl.className='act-btn reject';bdl.textContent='🗑 KALICI SİL';bdl.onclick=function(){deleteMember(m.id,m.name,cid);};body.appendChild(bdl);
    if(m.member_code){var cb=document.createElement('div');cb.className='code-box';cb.textContent=m.member_code;body.appendChild(cb);}
    if(m.status==='approved'){var repRow=document.createElement('div');repRow.className='rep-adj-row';repRow.innerHTML='<span class="t-label" style="flex:1">GÜVEN</span><button onclick="adjRep(\''+m.id+'\',\'trust\',-20,\''+cid+'\')" style="background:rgba(192,57,43,.1);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.2);border-radius:2px;padding:4px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px">−20</button><span class="t-mono" style="font-size:10px;width:40px;text-align:center">'+m.trust_score+'</span><button onclick="adjRep(\''+m.id+'\',\'trust\',20,\''+cid+'\')" style="background:rgba(61,155,90,.1);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(61,155,90,.2);border-radius:2px;padding:4px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:8px">+20</button>';body.appendChild(repRow);}
    var det=document.createElement('div');det.className='card-det';det.textContent='Email: '+(m.email||'—')+' | Tel: '+(m.phone||'—')+' | IG: '+(m.instagram||'—')+' | Katılım: '+(m.total_attended||0)+' | Gelmeme: '+(m.total_no_show||0);body.appendChild(det);card.appendChild(body);el.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function setMC(el2,s){document.querySelectorAll('#mChips .chip').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active');});el2.classList.add('active');State.memberFilter=s;renderM();}
async function approveMember(id,cid){_adminCardFlash(id,'✓ ONAYLANDI','a');var code='NIP-MBR-'+randomHex(6).toUpperCase();var refCode='NIP-REF-'+randomHex(6).toUpperCase();await _SB.from('profiles').update({status:'approved',member_code:code,referral_code:refCode,approved_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',id);await _SB.from('reputation_ledger').insert({profile_id:id,score_type:'trust',delta:100,balance_after:100,reason_code:'approved',source_type:'admin'}).catch(function(){});toast('Onaylandı → '+code);if(cid==='recM'){renderRecM();renderAdminStats();}else{renderMStats();renderM();renderAdminStats();}}
async function rejectMember(id,cid){_adminCardFlash(id,'✕ REDDEDİLDİ','r');await _SB.from('profiles').update({status:'rejected'}).eq('id',id);toast('Reddedildi');if(cid==='recM'){renderRecM();renderAdminStats();}else{renderMStats();renderM();renderAdminStats();}}
async function freezeMember(id,cid){_adminCardFlash(id,'❄ DONDURULDU','f');await _SB.from('profiles').update({status:'frozen'}).eq('id',id);toast('Donduruldu ❄');if(cid==='recM'){renderRecM();}else{renderMStats();renderM();}}
async function deleteMember(id,name,cid){if(!confirm(name+' kalıcı olarak silinsin mi?'))return;await _SB.from('profiles').delete().eq('id',id);toast(name+' silindi.');if(cid==='recM'){renderRecM();renderAdminStats();}else{renderMStats();renderM();renderAdminStats();}}
async function adjRep(profileId,type,delta,cid){var pRes=await _SB.from('profiles').select('trust_score,loyalty_score').eq('id',profileId).single();if(!pRes.data)return;var cur=type==='trust'?pRes.data.trust_score:pRes.data.loyalty_score;var newVal=Math.max(0,cur+delta);var upd={};upd[type+'_score']=newVal;if(type==='trust')upd.tier=newVal>=500?'elite':newVal>=300?'gold':newVal>=150?'silver':'bronze';await _SB.from('profiles').update(upd).eq('id',profileId);await _SB.from('reputation_ledger').insert({profile_id:profileId,score_type:type,delta:delta,balance_after:newVal,reason_code:'admin_adjustment',source_type:'admin'}).catch(function(){});toast((delta>0?'+':'')+delta+' '+type);if(cid==='recM')renderRecM();else renderM();}

// ═══ ADMIN EVENTS ═══
async function renderEvts(){
  var res=await _SB.from('events').select('*').order('date',{ascending:true});
  var list=document.getElementById('evtList');if(!list)return;list.innerHTML='';
  var data=res.data||[];var today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  if(!data.length){list.innerHTML='<div class="empty">Etkinlik yok.</div>';return;}
  data.forEach(function(e){
    var pct=Math.round(((e.approved_count||0)/(e.capacity||1))*100);var past=e.date<today;
    var d=document.createElement('div');d.className='ec';if(past)d.style.opacity='.4';
    var top=document.createElement('div');top.className='ec-top';
    var thumb=document.createElement('div');thumb.className='ec-thumb';
    if(e.poster_thumb){var img=document.createElement('img');img.src=e.poster_thumb;thumb.appendChild(img);}else{var ph=document.createElement('div');ph.className='ec-ph';ph.innerHTML='<span style="font-size:18px;color:var(--dim)">🎵</span>';thumb.appendChild(ph);}
    var info=document.createElement('div');info.className='ec-info';
    var accessLabel={open:'Açık',members_only:'Üyelere Özel',tier_restricted:'Seviye Kısıtlı',waitlist_only:'Bekleme Listesi'}[e.access_type]||e.access_type;
    info.innerHTML='<div class="ec-name">'+_esc(e.name)+(past?' (geçti)':'')+'</div><div class="ec-sub">'+_esc(e.genre||'')+(e.genre?' · ':'')+fmtDate(e.date)+(e.time?' · '+e.time:'')+' · '+accessLabel+'</div><div class="cap-row"><div class="cap-bg"><div class="cap-fill'+(pct>80?' full':pct>60?' warn':'')+'" style="width:'+pct+'%"></div></div><span class="cap-txt">'+(e.approved_count||0)+'/'+e.capacity+'</span></div>';
    top.appendChild(thumb);top.appendChild(info);d.appendChild(top);
    var acts=document.createElement('div');acts.className='ec-acts';
    [['🖼 AFİŞ',false],['✏️ DÜZENLE',false],['✕ SİL',true]].forEach(function(item,idx){var b=document.createElement('button');b.className='ec-act'+(item[1]?' del':'');b.textContent=item[0];if(idx===0)b.onclick=function(){updatePoster(e.id);};else if(idx===1)b.onclick=function(){editEvt(e.id);};else b.onclick=function(){deleteEvt(e.id,e.name);};acts.appendChild(b);});
    d.appendChild(acts);list.appendChild(d);
  });
}
function onPoster(ev){var f=ev.target.files[0];if(!f)return;compressAndStore(f,function(b64){State.newPosterB64=b64;var pp=document.getElementById('pPrev');if(pp)pp.style.display='block';var pi=document.getElementById('pPrevImg');if(pi)pi.src=b64;var uz=document.getElementById('uZone');if(uz)uz.style.display='none';toast('Afiş hazırlandı ✓');});}
function rmP(){State.newPosterB64=null;var pp=document.getElementById('pPrev');if(pp)pp.style.display='none';var uz=document.getElementById('uZone');if(uz)uz.style.display='block';}
function compressAndStore(file,cb){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(e){var img=new Image();img.onload=function(){var canvas=document.createElement('canvas');var maxW=800,maxH=1000,w=img.width,h=img.height;if(w>maxW){h=Math.round(h*maxW/w);w=maxW;}if(h>maxH){w=Math.round(w*maxH/h);h=maxH;}canvas.width=w;canvas.height=h;canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(img,0,0,w,h);cb(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.78));};img.src=e.target.result;};r.readAsDataURL(file);}
function updatePoster(id){var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.type='file';inp.accept='image/*';inp.onchange=function(e){var f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;compressAndStore(f,async function(b64){await _SB.from('events').update({poster_thumb:b64,poster_blur:b64.substring(0,200)}).eq('id',id);toast('Afiş güncellendi ✓');renderEvts();loadEvents();});};inp.click();}
async function editEvt(id){
  var res=await _SB.from('events').select('*').eq('id',id).single();var e=res.data;if(!e)return;
  // Fill form fields
  document.getElementById('neName').value=e.name||'';
  document.getElementById('neGenre').value=e.genre||'';
  document.getElementById('neSub').value=e.subtitle||'';
  document.getElementById('neDate').value=e.date||'';
  document.getElementById('neTime').value=e.time||'';
  document.getElementById('neCap').value=e.capacity||100;
  document.getElementById('neAccess').value=e.access_type||'open';
  document.getElementById('neMinTier').value=e.min_tier||'bronze';
  document.getElementById('neMinTrust').value=e.min_trust||0;
  document.getElementById('neRules').value=e.rules||'';
  var nc=document.getElementById('neColor');if(nc)nc.value=e.color||'';
  var wn=document.getElementById('neWarmupName');if(wn)wn.value=e.warmup_name||'';
  var ws=document.getElementById('neWarmupStart');if(ws)ws.value=e.warmup_start||'22:00';
  var we=document.getElementById('neWarmupEnd');if(we)we.value=e.warmup_end||'00:00';
  var te=document.getElementById('neTimeEnd');if(te)te.value=e.time_end||'04:00';
  if(e.poster_thumb){State.newPosterB64=e.poster_thumb;document.getElementById('pPrev').style.display='block';document.getElementById('pPrevImg').src=e.poster_thumb;document.getElementById('uZone').style.display='none';}
  else{rmP();}
  // Update button
  var btn=document.getElementById('addEvtBtn');
  btn.textContent='ETKİNLİĞİ GÜNCELLE';
  btn.style.background='var(--gold)';
  btn.onclick=function(){updateEvt(id);};
  // Highlight the add-wrap form
  var addWrap=document.querySelector('.add-wrap');
  if(addWrap){addWrap.style.border='1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.4)';addWrap.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 1px rgba(201,168,76,.15)';}
  // Scroll s-admin screen to top so form is visible
  var screen=document.getElementById('s-admin');
  if(screen)screen.scrollTop=0;
  // Make sure we're on ev tab
  aTab('ev');
  toast('✏️ Düzenleme modu açık — '+e.name);
}
async function updateEvt(id){var name=val('neName').trim().toUpperCase(),date=val('neDate'),cap=parseInt(val('neCap'));if(!name||!date||!cap){toast('İsim, tarih ve kapasite zorunlu');return;}var upd={name,genre:val('neGenre').trim(),subtitle:val('neSub').trim(),date,time:val('neTime'),time_end:val('neTimeEnd')||null,warmup_name:val('neWarmupName').trim()||null,warmup_start:val('neWarmupStart')||null,warmup_end:val('neWarmupEnd')||null,capacity:cap,access_type:val('neAccess'),min_tier:val('neMinTier'),min_trust:parseInt(val('neMinTrust'))||0,rules:val('neRules').trim(),color:val('neColor')||null};if(State.newPosterB64)upd.poster_thumb=State.newPosterB64;await _SB.from('events').update(upd).eq('id',id);var btn=document.getElementById('addEvtBtn');btn.textContent='ETKİNLİK OLUŞTUR';btn.style.background='';btn.onclick=addEvt;var aw=document.querySelector('.add-wrap');if(aw){aw.style.border='';aw.style.boxShadow='';}resetEvtForm();toast('Güncellendi ✓');renderEvts();loadEvents();delete State.rulesCache[id];}
async function addEvt(){var btn2=document.getElementById('addEvtBtn');if(btn2){btn2.style.background='';}var aw=document.querySelector('.add-wrap');if(aw){aw.style.border='';aw.style.boxShadow='';}var name=val('neName').trim().toUpperCase(),date=val('neDate'),cap=parseInt(val('neCap'));if(!name||!date||!cap){toast('İsim, tarih ve kapasite zorunlu');return;}var btn=document.getElementById('addEvtBtn');btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent='OLUŞTURULUYOR...';var neC=val('neColor');var ins=await _SB.from('events').insert({name,genre:val('neGenre').trim(),subtitle:val('neSub').trim(),date,time:val('neTime'),time_end:val('neTimeEnd')||null,warmup_name:val('neWarmupName').trim()||null,warmup_start:val('neWarmupStart')||null,warmup_end:val('neWarmupEnd')||null,capacity:cap,approved_count:0,poster_thumb:State.newPosterB64||null,poster_blur:State.newPosterB64?State.newPosterB64.substring(0,200):null,rules:val('neRules').trim(),note:null,access_type:val('neAccess')||'open',min_tier:val('neMinTier')||'bronze',min_trust:parseInt(val('neMinTrust'))||0,status:'active',color:neC||null});btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent='ETKİNLİK OLUŞTUR';btn.onclick=addEvt;if(ins.error){toast('Hata: '+ins.error.message);return;}resetEvtForm();toast(name+' oluşturuldu ✓');renderEvts();loadEvents();}
function resetEvtForm(){['neName','neGenre','neSub','neDate','neRules','neWarmupName'].forEach(function(x){document.getElementById(x).value='';});document.getElementById('neCap').value='100';document.getElementById('neMinTrust').value='0';document.getElementById('neAccess').value='open';var nc=document.getElementById('neColor');if(nc)nc.value='';var te=document.getElementById('neTimeEnd');if(te)te.value='04:00';var ws=document.getElementById('neWarmupStart');if(ws)ws.value='22:00';var we=document.getElementById('neWarmupEnd');if(we)we.value='00:00';rmP();}
async function deleteEvt(id,name){if(!confirm(name+' silinsin mi?'))return;await _SB.from('events').delete().eq('id',id);toast(name+' silindi');renderEvts();loadEvents();}
async function loadLastRules(){var res=await _SB.from('events').select('rules').order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(1).single();if(res.data&&res.data.rules){document.getElementById('neRules').value=res.data.rules;toast('Son kurallar yüklendi ✓');}}

// ═══ ADMIN RESERVATIONS ═══
async function populateEvtFilter(){var res=await _SB.from('events').select('id,name,date').order('date',{ascending:false}).limit(20);var fe=document.getElementById('filterEvt');if(!fe)return;fe.innerHTML='<option value="">Tüm Etkinlikler</option>';(res.data||[]).forEach(function(e){fe.innerHTML+='<option value="'+e.id+'">'+_esc(e.name)+' — '+fmtDate(e.date)+'</option>';});}
async function renderRecR(){var res=await _SB.from('reservations').select('*').order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(6);renderResCards(res.data||[],'recR');}
async function renderRes(){var filter=document.getElementById('filterEvt')?document.getElementById('filterEvt').value:'';var el=document.getElementById('rList');if(el)el.innerHTML='<div class="page-spin"></div>';var q=_SB.from('reservations').select('*').order('created_at',{ascending:false});if(filter)q=q.eq('event_id',filter);if(State.resFilter)q=q.eq('status',State.resFilter);var res=await q;renderResCards(res.data||[],'rList');}

function renderResCards(list,cid){
  var el=document.getElementById(cid);if(!el)return;
  if(!list.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty">Kayıt yok.</div>';return;}
  el.innerHTML='';
  list.forEach(function(r){
    var bc={pending:'p',approved:'a',rejected:'r',used:'u',no_show:'r',cancelled:'u'}[r.status]||'u';
    var bt={pending:'BEKLEMEDE',approved:'ONAYLANDI',rejected:'REDDEDİLDİ',used:'KULLANILDI',no_show:'GELMEDİ'}[r.status]||r.status;
    var card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card';
    var hdr=document.createElement('div');hdr.className='card-h';hdr.onclick=function(){this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open');};
    var nd=document.createElement('div');nd.style.cssText='flex:1;min-width:0';
    var ne=document.createElement('div');ne.className='card-name';ne.textContent=r.name||'—';
    var mt=document.createElement('div');mt.className='card-meta';mt.textContent=(r.event_name||'—')+' · '+(r.guest_count||1)+' kişi · '+(r.phone||'')+(r.profile_id?'':' (MİSAFİR)');
    var bg=document.createElement('span');bg.className='badge '+bc;bg.textContent=bt;
    nd.appendChild(ne);nd.appendChild(mt);hdr.appendChild(nd);hdr.appendChild(bg);card.appendChild(hdr);
    var body=document.createElement('div');body.className='card-body';
    if(r.status==='pending'){var b1=document.createElement('button');b1.className='act-btn approve';b1.textContent='✓ ONAYLA';b1.onclick=function(){approveRes(r.id,r.event_id,r.guest_count||1,cid);};body.appendChild(b1);var b2=document.createElement('button');b2.className='act-btn reject';b2.textContent='✕ REDDET';b2.onclick=function(){rejectRes(r.id,cid);};body.appendChild(b2);}
    if(r.status==='approved'){var bns=document.createElement('button');bns.className='act-btn reject';bns.textContent='— GELMEDİ';bns.onclick=function(){markNoShow(r.id,r.profile_id,cid);};body.appendChild(bns);}
    var det=document.createElement('div');det.className='card-det';det.textContent='Tel: '+(r.phone||'—')+' | QR: '+(r.qr_id||'—')+' | '+fmtDate(r.event_date||'')+' | Kurallar: '+(r.rules_accepted?'✓':'—');body.appendChild(det);
    if(r.status==='approved'&&r.phone){var waBtn=document.createElement('button');waBtn.className='act-btn approve';waBtn.style.cssText='background:rgba(37,211,102,.08);color:#25d366;border-color:rgba(37,211,102,.2);margin-top:4px';waBtn.textContent='💬 WhatsApp ile Gönder';(function(res2){waBtn.onclick=function(){var phone=res2.phone.replace(/[^0-9]/g,'');var guests=res2.guest_names&&res2.guest_names.length?'\
Davetliler: '+res2.guest_names.join(', '):'';var msg='🎫 NOT IN PARIS - Rezervasyon Onayı\
\
Etkinlik: '+res2.event_name+'\
Tarih: '+fmtDate(res2.event_date)+(res2.event_time?' · '+res2.event_time:'')+'\
İsim: '+res2.name+'\
Kişi: '+(res2.guest_count||1)+guests+'\
QR Kod: '+res2.qr_id+'\
\
🔗 https://reservation.notinparis.me\
\
Kapıda QR kodunuzu göstermeniz yeterlidir.';window.open('https://wa.me/'+phone+'?text='+encodeURIComponent(msg),'_blank');};})(r);body.appendChild(waBtn);}
    card.appendChild(body);el.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function setRC(el2,s){document.querySelectorAll('#rChips .chip').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active');});el2.classList.add('active');State.resFilter=s;renderRes();}
async function approveRes(id,evtId,count,cid){
  _adminCardFlash(id,'✓ ONAYLANDI','a');
  await _SB.from('reservations').update({status:'approved',approved_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',id);
  if(evtId){var ev=await _SB.from('events').select('approved_count').eq('id',evtId).single();if(ev.data)await _SB.from('events').update({approved_count:(ev.data.approved_count||0)+count}).eq('id',evtId);}
  toast('Onaylandı ✓');if(cid==='recR'){renderRecR();renderAdminStats();}else{renderRes();renderAdminStats();}
}
async function rejectRes(id,cid){_adminCardFlash(id,'✕ REDDEDİLDİ','r');await _SB.from('reservations').update({status:'rejected'}).eq('id',id);toast('Reddedildi');if(cid==='recR')renderRecR();else renderRes();}
async function markNoShow(id,profileId,cid){
  await _SB.from('reservations').update({status:'no_show'}).eq('id',id);
  if(profileId){var p=await _SB.from('profiles').select('trust_score,total_no_show,attendance_streak').eq('id',profileId).single();if(p.data){var nt=Math.max(0,(p.data.trust_score||100)-40);await _SB.from('profiles').update({total_no_show:(p.data.total_no_show||0)+1,trust_score:nt,attendance_streak:0}).eq('id',profileId);}}
  _adminCardFlash(id,'— GELMEDİ','r');toast('No-show. -40 puan');if(cid==='recR')renderRecR();else renderRes();
}
async function saveAnn(){await _SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'announcement',value:document.getElementById('annTxt').value});toast('Duyuru guncellendi ✓');}
async function saveSlogan(){var v=document.getElementById('sloganTxt').value;await _SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'slogan',value:v});var sl=document.getElementById('loginSlogan');if(sl)sl.textContent=v;toast('Slogan guncellendi ✓');}
async function saveAdminCreds(){var user=document.getElementById('newAdminUser').value.trim(),pw=document.getElementById('newAdminPw').value;if(!user||!pw){toast('Bos birakma');return;}await _SB.from('settings').upsert({key:'admin_credentials',value:JSON.stringify({username:user,password:pw})});toast('Admin bilgileri guncellendi ✓');document.getElementById('newAdminUser').value='';document.getElementById('newAdminPw').value='';}
async function startCam(){try{State.camStream=await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({video:{facingMode:'environment'}});var v=document.getElementById('qrVideo');v.srcObject=State.camStream;v.style.display='block';v.play();document.getElementById('camOff').style.display='none';document.getElementById('camOn').style.display='block';State.camTimer=setInterval(scanFrame,300);}catch(e){toast('Kamera erisimi reddedildi');}}
function stopCam(){if(State.camStream){State.camStream.getTracks().forEach(function(t){t.stop();});State.camStream=null;}if(State.camTimer){clearInterval(State.camTimer);State.camTimer=null;}var v=document.getElementById('qrVideo');if(v){v.style.display='none';v.srcObject=null;}var co=document.getElementById('camOff');if(co)co.style.display='block';var cn=document.getElementById('camOn');if(cn)cn.style.display='none';}
function scanFrame(){var v=document.getElementById('qrVideo');if(!v||v.readyState!==v.HAVE_ENOUGH_DATA)return;var c=document.getElementById('qrCanvas');c.width=v.videoWidth;c.height=v.videoHeight;var ctx=c.getContext('2d');ctx.drawImage(v,0,0,c.width,c.height);var img=ctx.getImageData(0,0,c.width,c.height);var code=jsQR(img.data,img.width,img.height,{inversionAttempts:'dontInvert'});if(code&&code.data&&code.data.startsWith('NIP-')){stopCam();document.getElementById('qrInput').value=code.data;scanQR();}}
async function scanQR(){
  var inp=document.getElementById('qrInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  var res2=document.getElementById('qrRes');if(!inp){toast('QR kodu girin');return;}
  res2.style.display='block';res2.className='qr-res';res2.innerHTML='<div class="spin-el light" style="margin:0 auto"></div>';
  var res=await _SB.from('reservations').select('*').eq('qr_id',inp).single();var r=res.data;
  if(!r){res2.className='qr-res i';res2.innerHTML='<span class="qr-big">GECERSIZ</span>Kod bulunamadi.';return;}
  if(r.status==='used'){res2.className='qr-res u';res2.innerHTML='<span class="qr-big">KULLANILMIS</span>'+_esc(r.name)+'<br>Zaten kullanildi.';return;}
  if(r.status!=='approved'){res2.className='qr-res i';res2.innerHTML='<span class="qr-big">ONAYSIZ</span>'+_esc(r.name)+'<br>Durum: '+r.status;return;}
  await _SB.from('reservations').update({status:'used',checked_in_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',r.id);
  var streakMsg='';
  if(r.profile_id){
    var pRes=await _SB.from('profiles').select('trust_score,loyalty_score,total_attended,total_reservations,attendance_streak,max_streak,last_attended_at,tier').eq('id',r.profile_id).single();
    if(pRes.data){
      var pd=pRes.data,tD=20,lD=50,sB=0;
      var la=pd.last_attended_at?new Date(pd.last_attended_at):null,ns=1;
      if(la&&(new Date()-la)<45*24*3600*1000)ns=pd.attendance_streak+1;
      if(ns>=10)sB=30;else if(ns>=5)sB=15;else if(ns>=3)sB=5;
      var nT=(pd.trust_score||100)+tD+sB,nL=(pd.loyalty_score||0)+lD;
      var nTier=nT>=500?'elite':nT>=300?'gold':nT>=150?'silver':'bronze';
      await _SB.from('profiles').update({trust_score:nT,loyalty_score:nL,tier:nTier,total_attended:(pd.total_attended||0)+1,total_reservations:(pd.total_reservations||0)+1,attendance_streak:ns,max_streak:Math.max(pd.max_streak||0,ns),last_attended_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',r.profile_id);
      await _SB.from('reputation_ledger').insert([{profile_id:r.profile_id,score_type:'trust',delta:tD+sB,balance_after:nT,reason_code:'attended'+(sB>0?'_streak':''),source_type:'event',source_id:r.event_id},{profile_id:r.profile_id,score_type:'loyalty',delta:lD,balance_after:nL,reason_code:'attended',source_type:'event',source_id:r.event_id}]).catch(function(){});
      if(ns>=2)streakMsg='<div class="checkin-streak">'+ns+' GECELIK SERI</div>';
      var tc=TIER_COLORS[nTier||'bronze'];var tl=(TIER_LABELS.tr)[nTier||'bronze']||'';
      res2.className='qr-res v';
      res2.innerHTML='<span class="qr-big">GIRIS OK</span><div class="checkin-card"><span class="tier-badge '+tc+' checkin-tier">'+tl+'</span><br><strong style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:2px">'+_esc(r.name)+'</strong><br>'+_esc(r.event_name||'')+' | '+(r.guest_count||1)+' kisi'+streakMsg+'</div>';
    }
  } else {
    res2.className='qr-res v';
    res2.innerHTML='<span class="qr-big">GIRIS OK</span>'+_esc(r.name)+'<br>'+_esc(r.event_name||'')+' | '+(r.guest_count||1)+' kisi';
  }
  document.getElementById('qrInput').value='';
}
// ═══ CALENDAR INLINE FORM ═══
function openCalForm(id){
  var e=State.events.find(function(x){return x.id===id;});if(!e)return;
  if(isMembersOnly(e)&&!userIsMember()){showMembersOnlyModal(e);return;}
  State.selectedEventId=id;
  var color=genreColor(e.genre,e.color);
  var gn=State.profile?(_esc(State.profile.name||'')):'';
  var gp=State.profile?(State.profile.phone||''):'';
  var ccVal='+90',numVal=gp;
  if(gp){var cm=gp.match(/^(\+\d{1,4})(\d+)$/);if(cm){ccVal=cm[1];numVal=cm[2];}}
  var phOpts='<option value="+90"'+(ccVal==='+90'?' selected':'')+'>🇹🇷 +90</option><option value="+7"'+(ccVal==='+7'?' selected':'')+'>🇷🇺 +7</option><option value="+1"'+(ccVal==='+1'?' selected':'')+'>🇺🇸 +1</option><option value="+44"'+(ccVal==='+44'?' selected':'')+'>🇬🇧 +44</option><option value="+49"'+(ccVal==='+49'?' selected':'')+'>🇩🇪 +49</option><option value="+33"'+(ccVal==='+33'?' selected':'')+'>🇫🇷 +33</option>';
  var guestNote=(!State.profile||!userIsMember())?'<div style="background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);border-radius:2px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);line-height:1.8">'+t('guestNote')+'</div>':'';
  var rulesHtml='';
  if(e.rules){rulesHtml='<div style="background:#060f14;border:1px solid #0d2035;border-left:3px solid var(--blue);border-radius:2px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:14px"><div style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:10px;color:#6899bb;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:12px;white-space:pre-line" id="cf-rules-'+id+'">'+_esc(e.rules)+'</div><label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #0d2035"><input type="checkbox" id="cf-check-'+id+'" style="width:18px;height:18px;accent-color:var(--blue);cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px"><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:#6899bb;line-height:1.7">🔵 '+t('rulesLbl')+'</span></label></div>';}
  var container=document.getElementById('cal-form-'+id);
  if(!container)return;
  // Toggle
  if(container.innerHTML&&container.classList.contains('cal-form-open')){
    container.classList.remove('cal-form-open');
    setTimeout(function(){container.innerHTML='';},350);
    return;
  }
  var schedHtmlC='';
  if(e.warmup_name||e.time_end){
    schedHtmlC='<div style="background:#080808;border:1px solid var(--dim);border-left:3px solid '+color+';border-radius:2px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:14px">';
    if(e.warmup_name){schedHtmlC+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dim)"><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);min-width:88px">'+(e.warmup_start||e.time||'')+(e.warmup_end?' — '+e.warmup_end:'')+'</span><span style="font-family:DM Sans,sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)">'+_esc(e.warmup_name)+'</span><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(--dim);margin-left:auto">WARM-UP</span></div>';}
    schedHtmlC+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px"><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--white);min-width:88px">'+(e.warmup_end||e.time||'')+(e.time_end?' — '+e.time_end:'')+'</span><span style="font-family:CV,sans-serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--white);font-weight:900">'+_esc(e.name)+'</span><span style="font-family:Space Mono,monospace;font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);margin-left:auto">MAIN</span></div>';
    schedHtmlC+='</div>';
  }
  container.innerHTML='<div class="ril-inner" style="border-left-color:'+color+';margin:0 -16px;background:#070707">'+
    schedHtmlC+guestNote+
    '<div class="f"><label>'+t('nameLbl')+'</label><input class="fi" type="text" id="cf-name-'+id+'" value="'+gn+'" placeholder="Adınız"></div>'+
    '<div class="f"><label>'+t('phoneLbl')+'</label><div class="ril-ph"><select class="ril-cc" id="cf-cc-'+id+'">'+phOpts+'</select><input class="ril-num fi" type="tel" id="cf-phone-'+id+'" value="'+numVal+'" placeholder="5xxxxxxxxx" inputmode="numeric" maxlength="15"></div></div>'+
    '<div class="f"><label>'+t('guestsLbl')+'</label><div class="count-row"><button class="cnt-btn" onclick="cfChg(\''+id+'\',-1)">−</button><div class="cnt-val" id="cf-cnt-'+id+'">1</div><button class="cnt-btn" onclick="cfChg(\''+id+'\',1)">+</button></div></div>'+
    '<div id="cf-guests-'+id+'"></div>'+
    rulesHtml+
    '<button class="btn" id="cf-btn-'+id+'" style="background:'+color+';color:#000" onclick="doResCal(\''+id+'\')"><span id="cf-btntxt-'+id+'">'+t('resBtn')+'</span></button>'+
  '</div>';
  container.classList.add('cal-form-open');
  if(e.rules&&State.lang!=='tr'){translateRules(id,e.rules,State.lang,document.getElementById('cf-rules-'+id));}
}

var _cfCounts={};
function cfChg(id,d){
  _cfCounts[id]=Math.max(1,Math.min(20,(_cfCounts[id]||1)+d));
  var cv=document.getElementById('cf-cnt-'+id);if(cv)cv.textContent=_cfCounts[id];
  var wrap=document.getElementById('cf-guests-'+id);if(!wrap)return;
  wrap.innerHTML='';
  for(var i=1;i<_cfCounts[id];i++){
    var div=document.createElement('div');div.className='f';
    var lbl=document.createElement('label');lbl.textContent=i+'. MİSAFİR';
    var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.className='fi';inp.type='text';inp.id='cf-guest-'+id+'-'+i;inp.placeholder=i+'. misafir';
    div.appendChild(lbl);div.appendChild(inp);wrap.appendChild(div);
  }
}

async function doResCal(id){
  var e=State.events.find(function(x){return x.id===id;});if(!e)return;
  var isGuest=!State.session||!State.profile||State.profile.status!=='approved';
  var name=(document.getElementById('cf-name-'+id)||{}).value||'';name=name.trim();
  var cc=(document.getElementById('cf-cc-'+id)||{}).value||'+90';
  var num=(document.getElementById('cf-phone-'+id)||{}).value||'';num=num.trim();
  var phone=num?(cc+num):'';
  if(!name){toast('İsim zorunludur');return;}
  if(!phone){toast('Telefon zorunludur');return;}
  var count=_cfCounts[id]||1;
  var chk=document.getElementById('cf-check-'+id);
  if(e.rules&&chk&&!chk.checked){toast('Lütfen etkinlik kurallarını onaylayın');return;}
  var access=canAccess(e);
  if(!access.allowed&&access.reason!=='members_only'){
    if(access.canWaitlist){await joinWaitlist(e.id);return;}
    toast({trust_too_low:'Güven skorunuz yetersiz',tier_insufficient:'Üyelik seviyeniz yetersiz',full:'Kapasite doldu'}[access.reason]||'Erişim yok');return;
  }
  var guestNames=[];
  for(var gi=1;gi<count;gi++){var gInp=document.getElementById('cf-guest-'+id+'-'+gi);if(gInp){var gv=gInp.value.trim();if(!gv){toast(gi+'. misafirin adını girin');return;}guestNames.push(gv);}}
  setLoading('cf-btn-'+id,'cf-btntxt-'+id,t('resBtn'),true);
  var qrId='NIP-'+randomHex(8).toUpperCase();
  var insertData={qr_id:qrId,event_id:id,event_name:e.name,event_date:e.date,event_time:e.time||'',name:name,phone:phone,guest_count:count,guest_names:guestNames,status:'pending',rules_accepted:chk?chk.checked:false};
  if(!isGuest&&State.session)insertData.profile_id=State.session.user.id;
  var ins=await _SB.from('reservations').insert(insertData).select().single();
  setLoading('cf-btn-'+id,'cf-btntxt-'+id,t('resBtn'),false);
  if(ins.error){if(ins.error.code==='23505')toast('Bu etkinliğe zaten kayıt yaptırdınız');else toast('Hata: '+ins.error.message);return;}
  toast('Rezervasyon talebiniz alındı ✓');
  _cfCounts[id]=1;
  if(!isGuest){G('s-tickets');openTickets();}
}

// ═══ ADMIN CARD INSTANT FLASH ═══
function _adminCardFlash(id,label,type){
  // Find card by id attribute and update badge immediately
  var allCards=document.querySelectorAll('.card');
  allCards.forEach(function(card){
    var btn=card.querySelector('[onclick*="'+id+'"]');
    if(!btn)return;
    // Update badge
    var badge=card.querySelector('.badge');
    if(badge){badge.textContent=label;badge.className='badge '+type;}
    // Disable action buttons
    card.querySelectorAll('.act-btn').forEach(function(b){b.disabled=true;b.style.opacity='.3';});
    // Flash card
    card.style.transition='background .15s';
    card.style.background=type==='a'?'rgba(61,155,90,.06)':'rgba(192,57,43,.06)';
    setTimeout(function(){card.style.background='';},1200);
  });
}

_SB.channel('admin-global')
  .on('postgres_changes',{event:'*',schema:'public',table:'profiles'},function(){if(document.getElementById('ap-mb').classList.contains('active')){renderMStats();renderM();}if(document.getElementById('ap-ov').classList.contains('active')){renderAdminStats();renderRecM();}})
  .on('postgres_changes',{event:'*',schema:'public',table:'reservations'},function(){if(document.getElementById('ap-rs').classList.contains('active'))renderRes();if(document.getElementById('ap-ov').classList.contains('active')){renderAdminStats();renderRecR();}})
  .subscribe();
(function(){var p=new URLSearchParams(location.search);var ref=p.get('ref');if(ref){var ri=document.getElementById('refInput');if(ri){ri.value=ref.toUpperCase();checkRef(ref.toUpperCase());}G('s-register');}})();
function val(id){var e=document.getElementById(id);return e?e.value:'';}
function setErr(id,msg){var e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.textContent=msg;}
function toast(msg){var t=document.getElementById('toastEl');if(!t)return;t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(t._t);t._t=setTimeout(function(){t.classList.remove('show');},2800);}
function setLoading(btnId,txtId,label,loading){var btn=document.getElementById(btnId),txt=document.getElementById(txtId);if(!btn)return;btn.disabled=loading;if(loading){if(txt)txt.innerHTML='<span class="spin-el"></span>';}else{if(txt)txt.textContent=label;}}
function fmtDate(s){if(!s)return '';try{return new Date(s+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('tr-TR',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'});}catch(e){return s;}}
function randomHex(n){var r='';for(var i=0;i<n;i++)r+='0123456789abcdef'[Math.floor(Math.random()*16)];return r;}
function _esc(s){if(!s)return '';return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#039;');}
</script>

</body>
</html>
